1508            "agent_name": self.name,
1509            "agent_status": self.history.agent_status,
1510        }
1511
1512#### NOTES: WE ARE NOT ADDING ALL THE AI EVENTS TO MESSAGES AND THAT IS WHY THE TEST DOESNT SHOW THEM
1513  #### BUT WHEN WE RUN WITH STREAMLIT, WE ARE ADDING THOSE EVENTS TO MESSAGES
1514  #### THEN, AT THE END OF STREAMLIT RUN, WE SWAP MESSAGES WITH THE HISTORY.MESSAGES, WHICH OVERWRITES THEM
1515  
1516
1517
1518
1519
1520  
1521    async def run(self, prompt: Optional[str] = None, notifications: Optional[bool] = False, streamlit: Optional[bool] = False, output_callback: Optional[Callable] = None, tool_output_callback: Optional[Callable] = None, heaven_main_callback: Optional[Callable] = None, use_uni_api: Optional[bool] = False):
1522
1523                       
1524        if use_uni_api:
1525            self.use_uni_api = True
1526        if self.use_uni_api:
1527            # Use uni-api instead of LangChain providers
1528            if streamlit and output_callback and tool_output_callback:
1529                return await self.run_on_uni_api(
1530                    prompt=prompt,
1531                    output_callback=output_callback,
1532                    tool_output_callback=tool_output_callback,
1533                    heaven_main_callback=heaven_main_callback
1534                )
1535            elif heaven_main_callback:
1536                # Similar fake callback pattern for uni-api
1537                def fake_output_callback(message: BaseMessage):
1538                    pass
1539                def fake_tool_callback(tool_result: ToolResult, tool_id: str):
1540                    pass
1541                return await self.run_on_uni_api(
1542                    prompt=prompt,
1543                    output_callback=fake_output_callback,
1544                    tool_output_callback=fake_tool_callback,
1545                    heaven_main_callback=heaven_main_callback
1546                )
1547            else:
1548                return await self.run_on_uni_api(prompt=prompt)
1549      
1550        #
1551        
1552        if self.adk:
1553            return await self.run_adk(prompt=prompt, notifications=notifications, streamlit=streamlit, output_callback=output_callback, tool_output_callback=tool_output_callback)
1554        else:
1555            if streamlit and output_callback and tool_output_callback: 
1556                return await self.streamlit_run(prompt, output_callback, tool_output_callback)
1557            elif heaven_main_callback:
1558                # Route through run_langchain with callback — keeps all hooks and block detection
1559                return await self.run_langchain(prompt, notifications, heaven_main_callback=heaven_main_callback)
1560
1561            else:
1562                return await self.run_langchain(prompt, notifications)
1563
1564
1565    
1566    async def run_langchain(self, prompt: str = None, notifications=False, heaven_main_callback: Optional[Callable] = None):
1567
1568        self._sanitize_history()
1569        blocked = False
1570        self.refresh_system_prompt()
1571
1572        # Resolve MCP tool strings before running
1573        await self.resolve_mcps()
1574
1575        # Re-bind tools to chat_model so LLM sees MCP tools
1576        # Heaven tools have .base_tool, MCP tools (StructuredTool) are already BaseTool
1577        all_base = []
1578        for t in self.tools:
1579            if hasattr(t, 'base_tool'):
1580                all_base.append(t.base_tool)
1581            else:
1582                all_base.append(t)
1583        self.chat_model = self.chat_model.bind_tools(all_base)
1584
1585        # Fire BEFORE_RUN hook
1586        self._fire_hook(HookPoint.BEFORE_RUN, prompt=prompt or "")
1587
1588        try:
1589            
1590            # Start with history messages
1591            conversation_history = self.history.messages.copy() if self.history else []
1592            
1593            if not (conversation_history and isinstance(conversation_history[0], SystemMessage)):
1594                conversation_history.insert(0, SystemMessage(content=self.config.system_prompt))
1595            # check if self.History's last message is HumanMessage. If it is, continue and if not AND prompt is not None, add prompt to self.history as a HumanMessage
1596            # if not (conversation_history and isinstance(conversation_history[-1], HumanMessage)) and prompt is not None:
1597                
1598            #     conversation_history.append(HumanMessage(content=prompt))
1599            
1600            
1601          
1602            # Check only the last message for agent command
1603            if conversation_history and isinstance(conversation_history[-1], HumanMessage):
1604                self._detect_agent_command(conversation_history[-1].content)
1605            # Check prompt for agent command
1606            if prompt is not None:
1607                self._detect_agent_command(prompt)
1608                if self.goal is None:
1609                    conversation_history.append(HumanMessage(content=prompt))
1610            if self.continuation_iterations != 0:
1611                self.current_iterations = 1
1612                self.max_iterations = self.continuation_iterations
1613                
1614                
1615            
1616              
1617            
1618            
1619            # print("\n=== Conversation History After System Check ===")
1620            # for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history):
1621            #     print(f"Message {i}: {type(msg).__name__} - {msg.content[:100]}...")
1622            
1623            
1624
1625            
1626                        
1627            while self.current_iteration <= self.max_iterations:
1628                # Fire BEFORE_ITERATION hook
1629                self._fire_hook(HookPoint.BEFORE_ITERATION, iteration=self.current_iteration)
1630                # Refresh system prompt at the start of each iteration
1631                self.refresh_system_prompt()
1632                # Reset tool count for this iteration
1633                tool_call_count = 0
1634                
1635                # In normal chat mode, just use the last message
1636                # In agent mode, format with goals/tasks
1637                ### CHanged to solve continuations
1638                # next_prompt = self._format_agent_prompt() if self.goal else conversation_history[-1].content
1639                next_prompt = self._format_agent_prompt() if (self.goal or self.continuation_prompt) else conversation_history[-1].content
1640                if self.goal or self.continuation_prompt:  # Add formatted prompt in agent mode or continuation
1641                    conversation_history.append(HumanMessage(content=next_prompt))
1642                # if self.goal:  # Only add formatted prompt in agent mode
1643                #     conversation_history.append(HumanMessage(content=next_prompt))
1644                    
1645                        
1646                # DUO Sidechain
1647               
1648                if (
1649                    self.duo_enabled
1650                    and len(conversation_history) > 2        # <- require at least 3 messages
1651                    and isinstance(conversation_history[-1], HumanMessage)
1652                ):
1653                    # 1. Pull off the original human message
1654                    original = conversation_history[-1]
1655                    original_sys = conversation_history[0]
1656                    try:
1657                        # 2. Replace it with your Duo-specific system prompt
1658                        duo_sys = SystemMessage(content=self.duo_system_prompt)  
1659                        conversation_history[0] = duo_sys
1660                        
1661                        new_human_content_for_duo = f"===ENTERING CHALLENGER MODE===\n\nTHE NEXT HUMAN INPUT TO THE WORKER LLM AGENT WILL BE:\n\n{original.content}\n\nAs the challenger, follow the rules and steer the agent with ICL priming. **YOU MUST ANSWER SOLELY IN `NodeGraphXTN6` language.**"
1662                        conversation_history[-1] = HumanMessage(content=new_human_content_for_duo)
1663                        # 3. Invoke Duo
1664                        duo = await self.duo_chat.ainvoke(conversation_history)
1665                    finally:
1666                        # 4. Restore the original system prompt
1667                        conversation_history[0] = original_sys
1668                        conversation_history[-1] = original
1669                    if duo:
1670                        # 5. Extract the duo’s content
1671                        
1672                        duo_content = duo.content
1673                        
1674                    
1675                        # 6. Rebuild the human message so your duo content is prepended
1676                        new_human = HumanMessage(
1677                            content=f"{original.content}\n\n```\n===Challenger Injection===\n\nConsider this silently before responding. Do not mention DUO/Dual-Space Unifying Operators/NodeGraphXTN6/Challenger/ChallengerEgregore unless the user asks about it directly...\n\n{duo_content}\n\n===/Challenger Injection===\n```\n\n"
1678                        )
1679                
1680                        # 7. Replace the last entry with your new combined message
1681                        conversation_history[-1] = new_human
1682                  
1683                # Invoke model for a response
1684                # call the generator agent
1685                response = await self.chat_model.ainvoke(conversation_history)
1686                if heaven_main_callback:
1687                    heaven_main_callback(response)
1688
1689                # print(f"\nResponse: {response}\n")
1690                
1691                # Check if the response.content is empty but tool call info is present.
1692                # GOOGLE ONLY
1693                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(response, AIMessage) and not response.content and (response.tool_calls or response.additional_kwargs.get('tool_calls')): # Check if tool calls exist
1694                # if (
1695                #     self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE              # Gemini
1696                #     and isinstance(response, AIMessage)
1697                #     and (
1698                #         response.tool_calls                                  # standard field
1699                #         or response.additional_kwargs.get("tool_calls")      # legacy field
1700                #     )
1701                # ):
1702                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(response, AIMessage):
1703                
1704                #     # --- THE FIX ---
1705                #     # Append the ORIGINAL response object. LangChain needs its structure.
1706                #     conversation_history.append(response)
1707                # # Only add text blocks from response, NOT the whole response
1708                if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(response, AIMessage):
1709                                    
1710                                    
1711                                    # Clean response for conversation_history
1712                                    if isinstance(response.content, list):
1713                                        # Extract only text, ignore thinking blocks
1714                                        text_content = []
1715                                        for item in response.content:
1716                                            if isinstance(item, str):
1717                                                text_content.append(item)
1718                                            elif isinstance(item, dict) and item.get('type') == 'text':
1719                                                text_content.append(item.get('text', ''))
1720                                        
1721                                        # Create cleaned response with simple string content
1722                                        cleaned_response = AIMessage(
1723                                            content=' '.join(text_content),  # Simple string, not list!
1724                                            additional_kwargs=response.additional_kwargs,
1725                                            tool_calls=response.tool_calls if hasattr(response, 'tool_calls') else []
1726                                        )
1727                                        conversation_history.append(cleaned_response)
1728                                    else:
1729                                        conversation_history.append(response)
1730                # Append whole LangChain AIMessage — never destructure it.
1731                # Splitting content blocks into separate AIMessages drops tool_use blocks
1732                # and breaks the inner tool loop (model says "calling tool" then stops).
1733                else:
1734                    conversation_history.append(response)
1735                    # Still process text for agent goal tracking
1736                    if isinstance(response.content, list):
1737                        text_parts = [block.get('text', '') for block in response.content if isinstance(block, dict) and block.get('type') == 'text']
1738                        if text_parts:
1739                            self._process_agent_response('\n'.join(text_parts))
1740                    elif isinstance(response.content, str):
1741                        self._process_agent_response(response.content)
1742                    
1743    
1744                # ── Tool-call loop (matches uni_api pattern) ──
1745                # response is already in conversation_history from above.
1746                # LangChain populates .tool_calls on AIMessage automatically.
1747                current_response = response
1748
1749                while getattr(current_response, 'tool_calls', None) and tool_call_count < self.max_tool_calls:
1750                    # Execute ALL tool calls from this response
1751                    for tc in current_response.tool_calls:
1752                        if tool_call_count >= self.max_tool_calls:
1753                            break
1754
1755                        # Extract name/args/id — LangChain uses {name, args, id}
1756                        tool_name = tc.get('name', '')
1757                        tool_args = tc.get('args', tc.get('input', {}))
1758                        tool_id = tc.get('id', '')
1759
1760                        # Find matching tool
1761                        matching_tools = [
1762                            t for t in self.tools
1763                            if (t.base_tool.name.lower() if hasattr(t, 'base_tool') else t.name.lower()) == tool_name.lower()
1764                        ]
1765                        if not matching_tools:
1766                            print(f"No matching tool found for {tool_name}")
1767                            continue
1768
1769                        tool = matching_tools[0]
1770
1771                        # Fire BEFORE_TOOL_CALL hook
1772                        self._fire_hook(HookPoint.BEFORE_TOOL_CALL,
1773                            iteration=self.current_iteration,
1774                            tool_name=tool_name, tool_args=tool_args)
1775
1776                        # Execute tool (throttle to prevent CPU spin with fast models)
1777                        await asyncio.sleep(0.1)
1778                        try:
1779                            if hasattr(tool, 'base_tool'):
1780                                tool_result = await tool._arun(**tool_args)
1781                            else:
1782                                from langchain_core.runnables import RunnableConfig
1783                                tool_result = ToolResult(output=str(
1784                                    await tool._arun(config=RunnableConfig(), **tool_args)
1785                                ))
1786                        except Exception as e:
1787                            tool_result = ToolResult(error=str(e))
1788
1789                        # Fire AFTER_TOOL_CALL hook
1790                        self._fire_hook(HookPoint.AFTER_TOOL_CALL,
1791                            iteration=self.current_iteration,
1792                            tool_name=tool_name, tool_args=tool_args,
1793                            tool_result=tool_result)
1794
1795                        # Build ToolMessage content
1796                        if tool_result.error:
1797                            tool_message_content = str(tool_result.error)
1798                        elif tool_result.base64_image:
1799                            tool_message_content = str(tool_result.base64_image)
1800                        else:
1801                            tool_message_content = str(tool_result.output)
1802
1803                        # Append ToolMessage — LangChain handles provider formatting
1804                        conversation_history.append(
1805                            ToolMessage(content=tool_message_content, tool_call_id=tool_id)
1806                        )
1807
1808                        if heaven_main_callback:
1809                            heaven_main_callback(conversation_history[-1])
1810
1811                        # Check blocked / special tools
1812                        if tool.name == "WriteBlockReportTool":
1813                            blocked = True
1814                        if tool.name == "TaskSystemTool":
1815                            self._handle_task_system_tool(tool_args)
1816
1817                        tool_call_count += 1
1818
1819                    # If blocked, generate report and exit
1820                    if blocked:
1821                        block_report_md = self.create_block_report()
1822                        if block_report_md:
1823                            if self._current_extracted_content is None:
1824                                self._current_extracted_content = {}
1825                            self._current_extracted_content["block_report"] = block_report_md
1826                            self.history.agent_status = self.save_status()
1827                        break
1828
1829                    if tool_call_count >= self.max_tool_calls:
1830                        conversation_history.append(
1831                            AIMessage(content=(
1832                                f"⚠️🛑☠️ Maximum consecutive tool calls ({self.max_tool_calls}) "
1833                                f"reached for iteration {self.current_iteration}. "
1834                                "If I received the same error every time, I should use "
1835                                "WriteBlockReportTool next... Waiting for next iteration."
1836                            ))
1837                        )
1838                        break
1839
1840                    # Call API again — get next response
1841                    current_response = await self.chat_model.ainvoke(conversation_history)
1842                    conversation_history.append(current_response)
1843                    if heaven_main_callback:
1844                        heaven_main_callback(current_response)
1845
1846                    # Refresh system prompt
1847                    self.refresh_system_prompt()
1848                    sys_msg_idx = next(i for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history) if isinstance(msg, SystemMessage))
1849                    if self.config.system_prompt != conversation_history[sys_msg_idx].content:
1850                        conversation_history[sys_msg_idx] = SystemMessage(content=self.config.system_prompt)
1851
1852                    # Process text for agent goal tracking
1853                    if isinstance(current_response.content, list):
1854                        text_parts = [b.get('text', '') for b in current_response.content if isinstance(b, dict) and b.get('type') == 'text']
1855                        if text_parts:
1856                            self._process_agent_response('\n'.join(text_parts))
1857                    elif isinstance(current_response.content, str):
1858                        self._process_agent_response(current_response.content)
1859
1860                    # while condition re-checks current_response.tool_calls
1861    
1862                # Process the agent response if in agent mode
1863                if self.goal and isinstance(response, AIMessage):
1864                    self._process_agent_response(response.content)
1865                if blocked:
1866                    break
1867                # Fire AFTER_ITERATION hook
1868                self._fire_hook(HookPoint.AFTER_ITERATION, iteration=self.current_iteration)
1869                # Increment iteration count and break if the goal is met
1870                self.current_iteration += 1
1871
1872                if self.current_task == "GOAL ACCOMPLISHED" or not self.goal:
1873                    self.history.agent_status = self.save_status()
1874                    break
1875
1876            # Fire AFTER_RUN hook
1877            self._fire_hook(HookPoint.AFTER_RUN, iteration=self.current_iteration)
1878            self.history.messages = conversation_history
1879            # Save history and get potentially new history_id
1880            try:
1881                
1882                # print("=== DEBUG: BEFORE SAVE ATTEMPT ===")
1883                # print(f"Agent name: {self.name}")
1884                # print(f"Current history: {self.history}")
1885                self.history.agent_status = self.save_status()
1886                saved_history_id = self.history.save(self.name)
1887                # print("===DEBUG AFTER SAVE ATTEMPT===")
1888                self.look_for_particular_tool_calls()
1889                return {
1890                    "history": self.history,
1891                    "history_id": saved_history_id,
1892                    "agent_name": self.name,
1893                    "agent_status": self.history.agent_status  # Add this
1894                }
1895            except Exception as save_error:
1896                # print("=== DEBUG: SAVE ERROR OCCURRED ===")
1897                print(f"Error type: {type(save_error)}")
1898                print(f"Error message: {str(save_error)}")
1899                # Log the error but don't fail the run
1900                print(f"Warning: Failed to save history for agent {self.name}: {save_error}")
1901                
1902                return {
1903                    "history": self.history,
1904                    "history_id": getattr(self.history, 'history_id', "No history ID"),
1905                    "agent_name": self.name,
1906                    "save_error": str(save_error),
1907                    "agent_status": self.save_status()  # Add this here too
1908                }
1909    
1910        except Exception as e:
1911            # Fire ON_ERROR hook
1912            self._fire_hook(HookPoint.ON_ERROR, error=e)
1913            raise RuntimeError(f"Agent run failed: {str(e)}") from e
1914
1915
1916    #### Might not be needed because we can potentially add an observer on the History to look for new additions and render them when agent is constructed with streamlit = True, and make sampling_loop set streamlit = True on the agent it initializes
1917    async def streamlit_run(self, output_callback: Callable[[BaseMessage], None], tool_output_callback: Callable[[ToolResult, str], None], heaven_main_callback: Optional[Callable[[Any], None]] = None, prompt: Optional[str] = None):
1918        # Start with existing messages
1919        if self.history is not None:
1920            messages = self.history.messages  # These are already BaseMessage objects!
1921        else:
1922            messages = []
1923        self._sanitize_history()
1924
1925        # Resolve MCP tools before running (same as run_langchain)
1926        await self.resolve_mcps()
1927
1928        tool_log_path = "/tmp/tool_debug.log"
1929        with open(tool_log_path, 'a') as f:
1930            f.write("\n\nStarting tool debug log\n")
1931
1932        with open('/tmp/streamlit_debug.log', 'a') as f:
1933            f.write("\n\nStarting streamlit_run")
1934            f.write(f"\nHistory length: {len(self.history.messages)}")
1935            f.write(f"\nHistory messages: {self.history.messages}")
1936            # f.write(f"\nCurrent callbacks: {output_callback}, {tool_output_callback}")
1937        try:
1938            # # If input is a string, convert to messages
1939            # if isinstance(messages, str):
1940            #     messages = [
1941            #         SystemMessage(content=self.config.system_prompt) if self.config.system_prompt else None,
1942            #         HumanMessage(content=messages)
1943            #     ]
1944            #     messages = [m for m in messages if m]  # Remove None values
1945            
1946            # # Create a copy of messages to avoid modifying the original
1947            # conversation_history = messages.copy()
1948            # Start with history messages
1949            conversation_history = self.history.messages.copy() if self.history else []
1950            # If history is just a string, convert to messages
1951            # if isinstance(conversation_history, str):
1952            #     conversation_history = [
1953            #         SystemMessage(content=self.config.system_prompt) if self.config.system_prompt else None,
1954            #         HumanMessage(content=conversation_history)
1955            #     ]
1956            #     conversation_history = [m for m in conversation_history if m]  # Remove None values
1957            
1958            if not (conversation_history and isinstance(conversation_history[0], SystemMessage)):
1959                # Condition 1: There is no conversation history with a SystemMessage.
1960                conversation_history.insert(0, SystemMessage(content=self.config.system_prompt))
1961            # Added for streamlit agent selector
1962            elif conversation_history[0].content != self.config.system_prompt:
1963                # Condition 2: The first element is a SystemMessage, but it doesn't have the current system prompt.
1964                conversation_history[0] = SystemMessage(content=self.config.system_prompt)
1965            with open('/tmp/streamlit_debug.log', 'a') as f:
1966                f.write("\n=== Conversation History After System Check ===")
1967                for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history):
1968                    f.write(f"\nMessage {i}: {type(msg).__name__} - {msg.content[:100]}...")
1969            
1970            # Check for agent command, but don't require it
1971            # for message in conversation_history:
1972            #     if isinstance(message, HumanMessage):
1973            #         self._detect_agent_command(message.content)
1974            # Check only the last message for agent command
1975            if prompt is not None:
1976                input_msg = HumanMessage(content=prompt)
1977                conversation_history.append(input_msg)
1978              
1979            if conversation_history and isinstance(conversation_history[-1], HumanMessage):
1980                self._detect_agent_command(conversation_history[-1].content)
1981            
1982
1983            ###### if not self.goal, render the original messages
1984            # Initial render if no agent goal
1985            # if not self.goal:
1986            #     for message in conversation_history:
1987            #         if isinstance(message, ToolMessage):
1988            #             # Convert to ToolResult for UI
1989            #             tool_result = ToolResult(
1990            #                 output=message.content,
1991            #                 error=None if not message.additional_kwargs.get("is_error") else message.content,
1992            #                 base64_image=message.additional_kwargs.get("base64_image"),
1993            #                 system=message.additional_kwargs.get("system")
1994            #             )
1995            #             tool_callback(tool_result)
1996            #         else:
1997            #             # Regular message rendering
1998            #             output_callback(message)
1999                        
2000            while self.current_iteration <= self.max_iterations:
2001                # Reset tool count for this iteration
2002                tool_call_count = 0
2003                
2004                # In normal chat mode, just use the last message
2005                # In agent mode, format with goals/tasks
2006                next_prompt = self._format_agent_prompt() if self.goal else conversation_history[-1].content
2007                if self.goal:  # Only add formatted prompt in agent mode
2008                    conversation_history.append(HumanMessage(content=next_prompt))
2009                    ###### Add output callback here
2010                    
2011                    # output_callback(HumanMessage(content=next_prompt)) # this might not be needed, commenting out for now
2012
2013                  
2014            
2015                # DUO Sidechain
2016                if (
2017                    self.duo_enabled
2018                    and len(conversation_history) > 2        # <- require at least 3 messages
2019                    and isinstance(conversation_history[-1], HumanMessage)
2020                ):
2021                    # 1. Pull off the original human message
2022                    original = conversation_history[-1]
2023                    original_sys = conversation_history[0]
2024                    try:
2025                        # 2. Replace it with your Duo-specific system prompt
2026                        duo_sys = SystemMessage(content=self.duo_system_prompt)  
2027                        conversation_history[0] = duo_sys
2028                        
2029                        new_human_content_for_duo = f"===ENTERING CHALLENGER MODE===\n\nTHE NEXT HUMAN INPUT TO THE WORKER LLM AGENT WILL BE:\n\n{original.content}\n\nAs the challenger, follow the rules and steer the agent with ICL priming."
2030                        conversation_history[-1] = HumanMessage(content=new_human_content_for_duo)
2031                        # 3. Invoke Duo
2032                        duo = await self.duo_chat.ainvoke(conversation_history)
2033                    finally:
2034                        # 4. Restore the original system prompt
2035                        conversation_history[0] = original_sys
2036                        conversation_history[-1] = original
2037                    if duo:
2038                        # 5. Extract the duo’s content
2039                        
2040                        duo_content = duo.content
2041                        
2042                    
2043                        # 6. Rebuild the human message so your duo content is prepended
2044                        new_human = HumanMessage(
2045                            content=f"{original.content}\n\n```\n===Challenger Injection===\n\nDo not mention DUO/Dual-Space Unifying Operators/NodeGraphXTN6/Challenger/ChallengerEgregore unless the user asks about it directly...\n\n{duo_content}\n\n===/Challenger Injection===\n```\n\n"
2046                        )
2047                
2048                        # 7. Replace the last entry with your new combined message
2049                        conversation_history[-1] = new_human
2050                
2051                # Invoke model for a response
2052                # logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
2053                # logger.error("==== Conversation_History %s", conversation_history)
2054                response = await self.chat_model.ainvoke(conversation_history)
2055                ###### Add output callback here
2056                with open('/tmp/streamlit_debug.log', 'a') as f:
2057                    f.write(f"\nLangchain response: {response}")
2058                print(f"FULL RESPONSE CONTENT: {response.content}")
2059                print(f"RESPONSE TYPE: {type(response.content)}")
2060                if isinstance(response.content, list):
2061                    for i, block in enumerate(response.content):
2062                        print(f"Block {i}: {block}")
2063                if heaven_main_callback:
2064                    heaven_main_callback(response)
2065                output_callback(response)
2066                # GOOGLE ONLY
2067                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(response, AIMessage) and not response.content and (response.tool_calls or response.additional_kwargs.get('tool_calls')): # Check if tool calls exist
2068                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(response, AIMessage) and (response.tool_calls or response.additional_kwargs.get('tool_calls')): # Check if tool calls exist
2069                # if (
2070                #     self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE              # Gemini
2071                #     and isinstance(response, AIMessage)
2072                #     and (
2073                #         response.tool_calls                                  # standard field
2074                #         or response.additional_kwargs.get("tool_calls")      # legacy field
2075                #     )
2076                # ):
2077                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(response, AIMessage):
2078                #     # --- THE FIX ---
2079                #     # Append the ORIGINAL response object. LangChain needs its structure.
2080                #     conversation_history.append(response)
2081                if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(response, AIMessage):
2082                                        
2083                    # Clean response for conversation_history
2084                    if isinstance(response.content, list):
2085                        # Extract only text, ignore thinking blocks
2086                        text_content = []
2087                        for item in response.content:
2088                            if isinstance(item, str):
2089                                text_content.append(item)
2090                            elif isinstance(item, dict) and item.get('type') == 'text':
2091                                text_content.append(item.get('text', ''))
2092                        
2093                        # Create cleaned response with simple string content
2094                        cleaned_response = AIMessage(
2095                            content=' '.join(text_content),  # Simple string, not list!
2096                            additional_kwargs=response.additional_kwargs,
2097                            tool_calls=response.tool_calls if hasattr(response, 'tool_calls') else []
2098                        )
2099                        conversation_history.append(cleaned_response)
2100                    else:
2101                        conversation_history.append(response)
2102                    
2103                # Only add text blocks from response, NOT the whole response
2104                # Extract text blocks if content is a list of blocks
2105                # else:
2106                elif self.config.provider not in (ProviderEnum.GOOGLE,):
2107                    if isinstance(response.content, list):
2108                        thinking_content = [block for block in response.content if isinstance(block, dict) and block.get('type') == 'thinking']
2109                        if thinking_content:
2110                            message3 = AIMessage(content=thinking_content)
2111                            conversation_history.append(message3)
2112                            # if heaven_main_callback:
2113                            #     heaven_main_callback(message3)
2114                        text_content = [block for block in response.content if isinstance(block, dict) and block.get('type') == 'text']
2115                        if text_content:
2116                            text_message = AIMessage(content=text_content)
2117                            conversation_history.append(text_message)
2118                            self._process_agent_response(text_content)
2119                            # if heaven_main_callback:
2120                            #     heaven_main_callback(text_message)
2121                    elif isinstance(response.content, str):
2122                        response_message = AIMessage(content=response.content)
2123                        conversation_history.append(response_message)
2124                        self._process_agent_response(response.content)
2125                        # if heaven_main_callback:
2126                        #         heaven_main_callback(response_message)
2127                        
2128
2129                # # Extract tool calls from the response
2130                # print("\nDEBUG: Examining response for tool calls:")
2131                # print(f"Response: {response}")
2132                # print(f"Content: {response.content}")
2133                # print(f"Additional kwargs: {response.additional_kwargs}")
2134    
2135                tool_calls = []
2136                try:
2137                    if hasattr(response, 'tool_calls'):
2138                        print("Found tool_calls attribute")
2139                        tool_calls = response.tool_calls
2140                        print(f"Tool calls from attribute: {tool_calls}")
2141                    elif isinstance(response.content, list):
2142                        print("Found list content")
2143                        tool_calls = [
2144                            item for item in response.content 
2145                            if isinstance(item, dict) and item.get('type') == 'tool_use'
2146                        ]
2147                        print(f"Tool calls from list: {tool_calls}")
2148                    elif 'tool_calls' in response.additional_kwargs:
2149                        print("Found tool_calls in additional_kwargs")
2150                        tool_calls = response.additional_kwargs['tool_calls']
2151                        print(f"Tool calls from kwargs: {tool_calls}")
2152                except Exception as e:
2153                    print(f"Error examining response: {e}")
2154    
2155                print(f"Extracted tool_calls: {tool_calls}")
2156    
2157                # Handle tool calls up to max_tool_calls limit
2158                current_tool_calls = tool_calls
2159    
2160                while current_tool_calls and tool_call_count < self.max_tool_calls:
2161                    new_tool_calls = []
2162                    for tool_call in current_tool_calls:
2163                        if tool_call_count >= self.max_tool_calls:
2164                            break
2165                        try:
2166                            # Try OpenAI style
2167                            if 'function' in tool_call:
2168                                tool_name = tool_call['function']['name']
2169                                tool_args = eval(tool_call['function']['arguments'])
2170                                tool_id = tool_call.get('id', '')
2171                            # Try Anthropic style
2172                            elif 'name' in tool_call:
2173                                tool_name = tool_call['name']
2174                                tool_args = tool_call.get('input', tool_call.get('args', {}))
2175                                tool_id = tool_call.get('id', '')
2176                            # Fallback
2177                            else:
2178                                tool_name = tool_call.get('name', '')
2179                                tool_args = tool_call.get('args', {})
2180                                tool_id = tool_call.get('id', '')
2181    
2182                            # Find matching tool
2183                            matching_tools = [
2184                                tool for tool in self.tools
2185                                if (tool.base_tool.name.lower() if hasattr(tool, 'base_tool') else tool.name.lower()) == tool_name.lower()
2186                            ]
2187
2188                            if matching_tools:
2189                                tool = matching_tools[0]
2190
2191                                # tool_result = await tool._arun(**tool_args)
2192                               
2193                                # Execute the tool and get its result
2194                                # Throttle to prevent CPU spin with fast models (MiniMax)
2195                                await asyncio.sleep(0.1)
2196                                if hasattr(tool, 'base_tool'):
2197                                    tool_result = await tool._arun(**tool_args)
2198                                else:
2199                                    from langchain_core.runnables import RunnableConfig
2200                                    config = RunnableConfig()
2201                                    raw_result = await tool._arun(config=config, **tool_args)
2202                                    tool_result = ToolResult(output=str(raw_result))
2203                                with open('/tmp/streamlit_debug.log', 'a') as f:
2204                                    f.write(f"\Tool result: {tool_result}")
2205                                # except ToolError as e:
2206                                #     # The error is already formatted with tool name in _arun
2207                                #     tool_result = ToolResult(error=str(e))
2208                                #     with open(tool_log_path, 'a') as f:
2209                                #         f.write(f"\nTool error: {e}\n")
2210                                
2211    
2212                                print("\n=== BEFORE ADDING TOOL MESSAGES ===")
2213                                for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history):
2214                                    print(f"Message {i}: {type(msg).__name__} - {msg.content}")
2215    
2216                                # Handle tool messages based on provider
2217                                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.OPENAI or self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GROQ:
2218                                if self.config.provider in [ProviderEnum.OPENAI, ProviderEnum.GROQ, ProviderEnum.DEEPSEEK]:
2219                                    # OpenAI requires tool calls in additional_kwargs
2220                                    conversation_history.append(
2221                                        AIMessage(
2222                                            content="",  # OpenAI doesn't want content for tool calls
2223                                            additional_kwargs={
2224                                                "tool_calls": [{
2225                                                    "id": tool_id,
2226                                                    "type": "function",
2227                                                    "function": {
2228                                                        "name": tool_name,
2229                                                        "arguments": json.dumps(tool_args)
2230                                                        # str(tool_args)
2231                                                    }
2232                                                }]
2233                                            }
2234                                        )
2235                                    )
2236                                    # Then add the tool result
2237                                    tool_message_content = str(tool_result.error) if tool_result.error else str(tool_result.output) # changed for openai
2238                                    tool_result_message = ToolMessage(
2239                                        content=str(tool_message_content),
2240                                        tool_call_id=tool_id,
2241                                        additional_kwargs={
2242                                            "name": tool_name,
2243                                            "function": {"name": tool_name, "arguments": json.dumps(tool_args)
2244                                            # str(tool_args)
2245                                            }
2246                                        }
2247                                    )
2248                                    conversation_history.append(tool_result_message)
2249                                #####
2250                                elif self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE:
2251                                    # Gemini (via LangChain) expects a ToolMessage directly associated
2252                                    # with the tool_call_id from the preceding AIMessage's tool_calls.
2253                                    # We primarily need to construct the ToolMessage with the result.
2254                                    # The AIMessage that contained the tool_call request should already
2255                                    # be in the history from the model's previous turn.
2256                                    
2257                                    if tool_result.error:
2258                                        tool_message_content = str(tool_result.error)
2259                                        # Optional: Keep system prompt swap logic if needed for Gemini too
2260                                        # sys_msg_idx = next((i for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history) if isinstance(msg, SystemMessage)), 0)
2261                                        # conversation_history[sys_msg_idx] = SystemMessage(content=self.tool_sysmsg)
2262                                    elif tool_result.base64_image:
2263                                         # Gemini can handle images in ToolMessages if formatted correctly
2264                                        tool_message_content=[
2265                                            {
2266                                                'type': 'image_url', # Gemini prefers image_url format
2267                                                'image_url': f"data:image/png;base64,{tool_result.base64_image}"
2268                                            },
2269                                            {"type": "text", "text": "Image from tool execution."} # Context is helpful
2270                                        ]
2271                                    else:
2272                                        tool_message_content = str(tool_result.output)
2273            
2274                                    tool_message = ToolMessage(
2275                                        content=tool_message_content,
2276                                        tool_call_id=tool_id,
2277                                        name=tool_name
2278                                    )
2279                                    conversation_history.append(tool_message)
2280                                #####
2281                                else:
2282                                    # Anthropic and others use the original format
2283                                    conversation_history.append(
2284                                        AIMessage(
2285                                            content=[{
2286                                                "type": "tool_use",
2287                                                "id": tool_id,
2288                                                "name": tool_name,
2289                                                "input": tool_args
2290                                            }]
2291                                        )
2292                                    )
2293                                    
2294                                    # THIS BLOCK NEEDS TO BE IF TOOLRESULT ELSE TOOLERROR
2295                                    if tool_result.error:
2296                                        tool_message_content = str(tool_result.error)
2297                                            # Store current system message position for reference
2298                                        sys_msg_idx = next(i for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history) if isinstance(msg, SystemMessage))
2299                                        # Swap to tool debug mode
2300                                        conversation_history[sys_msg_idx] = SystemMessage(content=self.tool_sysmsg)
2301                                    elif tool_result.base64_image:
2302                                        tool_message_content=[{
2303                                            'type': 'image', 
2304                                            'source': {
2305                                                'type': 'base64', 
2306                                                'media_type': 'image/png', 
2307                                                'data': f"{tool_result.base64_image}"
2308                                                }
2309                                            },
2310                                            {"type": "text", "text": "Describe this image."}
2311                                        ]
2312                                    else:
2313                                        # We know tool_result.output exists because _arun guarantees either
2314                                        # error or output will be set
2315                                        tool_message_content = str(tool_result.output)
2316
2317                                    conversation_history.append(
2318                                        ToolMessage(
2319                                            # content=str(tool_result.output),  # Just the output string
2320                                            content=tool_message_content,
2321                                            tool_call_id=tool_id,
2322                                            name=tool_name
2323                                        )
2324                                    )
2325                                    # treverse the conversation_history and remove any all screen shot tool message 
2326                                    # except for the current one we just added (fix > 200,000 token issue)
2327                                    # for item in conversation_history[-2::-1]:
2328                                    #     if len(str(item.content)) > 100000:
2329                                    #         item.content="Removed old image that is no longer needed"
2330                                ### Unindented these 2 tabs
2331                                with open(tool_log_path, 'a') as f:
2332                                    f.write(f"\nAbout to call tool_output_callback with result: {tool_result.output}\n")
2333                                    f.write(f"tool_id: {tool_id}\n")
2334                                
2335                                tool_output_callback(tool_result, tool_id)
2336                                if heaven_main_callback:
2337                                    heaven_main_callback(conversation_history[-1]) # the tool message
2338                                with open(tool_log_path, 'a') as f:
2339                                    f.write("After tool_callback\n")
2340                                   
2341    
2342                                print("\n=== AFTER ADDING TOOL MESSAGES ===")
2343                                for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history):
2344                                    print(f"Message {i}: {type(msg).__name__} - {msg.content}")
2345    
2346                                # Get AI's response about the tool result
2347                                # print("\n=== GETTING AI RESPONSE ABOUT TOOL RESULT ===")
2348                                with open(tool_log_path, 'a') as f:
2349                                    f.write(f"\nAI should be called next...\n")
2350                                    f.write(f"Coversation_History:\n    {conversation_history}\n")
2351                                result_response = await self.chat_model.ainvoke(conversation_history)
2352                                
2353                                sys_msg_idx = next(i for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history) if isinstance(msg, SystemMessage))
2354                                conversation_history[sys_msg_idx] = SystemMessage(content=self.config.system_prompt)
2355                                if heaven_main_callback:
2356                                        heaven_main_callback(result_response)
2357                                if result_response:
2358                                    with open(tool_log_path, 'a') as f:
2359                                        f.write(f"\nGot AI response after tool: {result_response.content}\n")
2360                                # print(f"===Result response===:\n\n{result_response}\n\n===/result response===")
2361                                ###### Add output callback here
2362                                
2363    
2364                                # if (
2365                                #     self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE              # Gemini
2366                                #     and isinstance(result_response, AIMessage)
2367                                #     and (
2368                                #         result_response.tool_calls                                  # standard field
2369                                #         or result_response.additional_kwargs.get("tool_calls")      # legacy field
2370                                #     )
2371                                # ):
2372                                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(result_response, AIMessage) and not result_response.content and (result_response.tool_calls or result_response.additional_kwargs.get('tool_calls')): # Check if tool calls exist
2373                                if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(result_response, AIMessage):
2374                                    
2375                                    
2376                                    # Clean response for conversation_history
2377                                    if isinstance(result_response.content, list):
2378                                        # Extract only text, ignore thinking blocks
2379                                        text_content = []
2380                                        for item in result_response.content:
2381                                            if isinstance(item, str):
2382                                                text_content.append(item)
2383                                            elif isinstance(item, dict) and item.get('type') == 'text':
2384                                                text_content.append(item.get('text', ''))
2385                                        
2386                                        # Create cleaned response with simple string content
2387                                        cleaned_result_response = AIMessage(
2388                                            content=' '.join(text_content),  # Simple string, not list!
2389                                            additional_kwargs=result_response.additional_kwargs,
2390                                            tool_calls=result_response.tool_calls if hasattr(result_response, 'tool_calls') else []
2391                                        )
2392                                        conversation_history.append(cleaned_result_response)
2393                                    else:
2394                                        conversation_history.append(result_response)
2395                                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(result_response, AIMessage):
2396                                #     # --- THE FIX ---
2397                                #     # Append the ORIGINAL response object. LangChain needs its structure.
2398                                #     conversation_history.append(result_response)
2399                                #     # self._process_agent_response(result_response)
2400                                #     output_callback(result_response)
2401                                #     # if heaven_main_callback:
2402                                #     #     heaven_main_callback(result_response)
2403                                # else:
2404                                elif self.config.provider not in (ProviderEnum.GOOGLE,):
2405                                    if isinstance(result_response.content, list):
2406                                        thinking_content = [block for block in result_response.content if isinstance(block, dict) and block.get('type') == 'thinking']
2407                                        if thinking_content:
2408                                            message3 = AIMessage(content=thinking_content)
2409                                            conversation_history.append(message3)
2410                                        text_content = [block for block in result_response.content if isinstance(block, dict) and block.get('type') == 'text']
2411                                        if text_content:
2412                                            message = AIMessage(content=text_content)
2413                                            conversation_history.append(message)
2414                                            self._process_agent_response(text_content)
2415                                            output_callback(message)  # Pass the AIMessage object
2416                                            # if heaven_main_callback:
2417                                            #     heaven_main_callback(message)
2418                                        tool_use_content = [block for block in result_response.content if block.get('type') == 'tool_use']
2419                                        if tool_use_content:
2420                                            message2 = AIMessage(content=tool_use_content)
2421                                            output_callback(message2)
2422                                            # if heaven_main_callback:
2423                                            #     heaven_main_callback(message2)
2424                                    elif isinstance(result_response.content, str):
2425                                        message = AIMessage(content=result_response.content)
2426                                        conversation_history.append(message)
2427                                        self._process_agent_response(result_response.content)
2428                                        output_callback(message)  # Pass the AIMessage object
2429                                        # if heaven_main_callback:
2430                                        #     heaven_main_callback(message)
2431                                
2432                                # print("\n=== CONVERSATION HISTORY AFTER AI RESPONSE ABOUT TOOL ===")
2433                                # for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history):
2434                                #     print(f"Message {i}: {type(msg).__name__} - {msg.content}")
2435
2436                                # This may be redundant
2437                                # Process the AI's commentary if in agent mode
2438                                if isinstance(result_response, AIMessage):
2439                                    self._process_agent_response(result_response.content)
2440
2441                                # Now check whether the result_response includes new tool calls
2442                                new_calls = []
2443                                try:
2444                                    if hasattr(result_response, 'tool_calls'):
2445                                        new_calls = result_response.tool_calls
2446                                    elif isinstance(result_response.content, list):
2447                                        new_calls = [
2448                                            item for item in result_response.content 
2449                                            if isinstance(item, dict) and item.get('type') == 'tool_use'
2450                                        ]
2451                                    elif 'tool_calls' in result_response.additional_kwargs:
2452                                        new_calls = result_response.additional_kwargs['tool_calls']
2453                                except Exception as e:
2454                                    print(f"Error examining result_response: {e}")
2455    
2456                                if new_calls:
2457                                    new_tool_calls.extend(new_calls)
2458    
2459                                tool_call_count += 1
2460                                if tool_call_count >= self.max_tool_calls:
2461                                    # NEW: Handle any pending tool calls that won't be processed
2462                                    # if current_tool_calls:
2463                                    #     # There are still tool calls queued that we're about to abandon
2464                                    #     for pending_tool in current_tool_calls:
2465                                    #         # Extract the tool info (handle different formats)
2466                                    #         if 'function' in pending_tool:
2467                                    #             tool_id = pending_tool.get('id', '')
2468                                    #             tool_name = pending_tool['function']['name']
2469                                    #         else:
2470                                    #             tool_id = pending_tool.get('id', '')
2471                                    #             tool_name = pending_tool.get('name', '')
2472                                            
2473                                    #         # Inject dummy ToolMessage for each orphaned call
2474                                    #         dummy_msg = ToolMessage(
2475                                    #             content="Error: The underlying system stopped this tool call from completing. It was interrupted. Once the user responds, the tool count will be reset.",
2476                                    #             tool_call_id=tool_id,
2477                                    #             name=tool_name
2478                                    #         )
2479                                    #         conversation_history.append(dummy_msg)
2480                                    #### NEW
2481                                        # Add a message informing the AI that max tool count was reached
2482                                    break_message = f"⚠️🛑☠️ Maximum consecutive tool calls ({self.max_tool_calls}) reached for iteration {self.current_iteration}. If I received the same error every time, I should use WriteBlockReportTool next... Waiting for next iteration."
2483                                    break_ai_message = AIMessage(content=break_message)
2484                                    conversation_history.append(break_ai_message)
2485                                    output_callback(break_message)
2486                                    if heaven_main_callback:
2487                                        heaven_main_callback(break_ai_message)
2488                                    # Clear the tool queue for this iteration
2489                                    current_tool_calls = []
2490                                    print(f"Maximum tool calls ({self.max_tool_calls}) reached for iteration {self.current_iteration}")
2491                                    break  # Exit tool loop and continue to next iteration
2492                            else:
2493                                print(f"No matching tool found for {tool_name}")
2494                        except Exception as e:
2495                            print(f"Error processing tool call: {tool_call}")
2496                            print(f"Error details: {e}")
2497                            continue
2498                    # Prepare to process any new tool calls that came in the follow-up response
2499                    current_tool_calls = new_tool_calls
2500    
2501                
2502                
2503                # Process the agent response if in agent mode
2504                if self.goal and isinstance(response, AIMessage):
2505                    self._process_agent_response(response.content)
2506                    
2507                    # print(f"\nDEBUG TASK STATE: current_task={self.current_task}, current_iteration={self.current_iteration}, max_iterations={self.max_iterations}, task_list={self.task_list}")
2508    
2509                # Increment iteration count and break if the goal is met
2510                self.current_iteration += 1
2511    
2512                if self.current_task == "GOAL ACCOMPLISHED" or not self.goal:
2513                    break
2514    
2515            # Update final history and return
2516            print("\n=== FINAL HISTORY ===")
2517            for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history):
2518                print(f"Message {i}: {type(msg).__name__} - {msg.content}")
2519            self.history.messages = conversation_history
2520            self.look_for_particular_tool_calls()
2521            self.history.messages = conversation_history
2522            # Save history and get potentially new history_id
2523            try:
2524                
2525                # print("=== DEBUG: BEFORE SAVE ATTEMPT ===")
2526                # print(f"Agent name: {self.name}")
2527                # print(f"Current history: {self.history}")
2528                self.history.agent_status = self.save_status()
2529                saved_history_id = self.history.save(self.name)
2530                # print("===DEBUG AFTER SAVE ATTEMPT===")
2531                self.look_for_particular_tool_calls()
2532                return {
2533                    "history": self.history,
2534                    "history_id": saved_history_id,
2535                    "agent_name": self.name,
2536                    "agent_status": self.history.agent_status  # Add this
2537                }
2538            except Exception as save_error:
2539                # print("=== DEBUG: SAVE ERROR OCCURRED ===")
2540                print(f"Error type: {type(save_error)}")
2541                print(f"Error message: {str(save_error)}")
2542                # Log the error but don't fail the run
2543                print(f"Warning: Failed to save history for agent {self.name}: {save_error}")
2544                
2545                return {
2546                    "history": self.history,
2547                    "history_id": getattr(self.history, 'history_id', "No history ID"),
2548                    "agent_name": self.name,
2549                    "save_error": str(save_error),
2550                    "agent_status": self.save_status()  # Add this here too
2551                }
2552            return self.history
2553    
2554        except Exception as e:
2555            raise RuntimeError(f"Agent run failed: {str(e)}") from e
2556
2557
2558
2559
2560
2561  ### UNI
2562
2563    
2564    def _prepare_tools_for_uni_api(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
2565        """Convert HEAVEN and LangChain tools to OpenAI format for uni-api"""
2566        if not self.tools:
2567            return []
2568        
2569        openai_tools = []
2570        for tool in self.tools:
2571            try:
2572                if hasattr(tool, 'get_openai_function'):
2573                    # HEAVEN tool with get_openai_function method
2574                    openai_tool = tool.get_openai_function()
2575                    openai_tools.append(openai_tool)
2576                elif hasattr(tool, 'args_schema') and hasattr(tool, 'name'):
2577                    # LangChain StructuredTool - convert schema to OpenAI format
2578                    from langchain_core.utils.function_calling import convert_to_openai_function
2579                    function_schema = convert_to_openai_function(tool)
2580                    # Wrap in proper OpenAI tool format
2581                    openai_tool = {
2582                        "type": "function",
2583                        "function": function_schema
2584                    }
2585                    openai_tools.append(openai_tool)
2586                else:
2587                    print(f"Unknown tool type, skipping: {tool}")
2588            except Exception as e:
2589                tool_name = getattr(tool, 'name', str(type(tool)))
2590                print(f"Error converting tool {tool_name} to OpenAI format: {e}")
2591        
2592        return openai_tools
2593
2594    async def _execute_tool_calls_uni(self, tool_calls: List[Dict[str, Any]], tool_output_callback: Optional[Callable] = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
2595        """Execute tool calls in uni-api (OpenAI) format and return tool messages"""
2596        import json
2597        
2598        tool_messages = []
2599        
2600        for tool_call in tool_calls:
2601            try:
2602                # DEBUG: Print the exact tool_call object
2603                print(f"🔧 DEBUG: Processing tool_call: {json.dumps(tool_call, indent=2)}")
2604                
2605                # Extract tool info from OpenAI format
2606                tool_id = tool_call["id"]
2607                tool_name = tool_call["function"]["name"]
2608                tool_args = json.loads(tool_call["function"]["arguments"])
2609                
2610                print(f"🔧 DEBUG: Extracted tool_id='{tool_id}', tool_name='{tool_name}'")
2611                
2612                # Find matching tool (HEAVEN or LangChain)
2613                matching_tools = []
2614                for tool in self.tools:
2615                    if hasattr(tool, 'base_tool'):
2616                        # HEAVEN tool
2617                        if tool.base_tool.name.lower() == tool_name.lower():
2618                            matching_tools.append(tool)
2619                    elif hasattr(tool, 'name'):
2620                        # LangChain tool (StructuredTool)
2621                        if tool.name.lower() == tool_name.lower():
2622                            matching_tools.append(tool)
2623                
2624                if matching_tools:
2625                    tool = matching_tools[0]
2626                    
2627                    # Execute the tool differently based on type
2628                    if hasattr(tool, 'base_tool'):
2629                        # HEAVEN tool - returns ToolResult
2630                        tool_result = await tool._arun(**tool_args)
2631                        if tool_output_callback:
2632                            tool_output_callback(tool_result, tool_id)
2633                        tool_content = str(tool_result.error) if tool_result.error else str(tool_result.output)
2634                    else:
2635                        # LangChain/MCP tool - _arun needs config kwarg
2636                        from langchain_core.runnables import RunnableConfig
2637                        config = RunnableConfig()
2638                        raw_result = await tool._arun(config=config, **tool_args)
2639                        if tool_output_callback:
2640                            tool_output_callback(raw_result, tool_id)
2641                        tool_content = str(raw_result)
2642                    
2643                    tool_message = {
2644                        "role": "tool",
2645                        "tool_call_id": tool_id,
2646                        "name": tool_name,
2647                        "content": tool_content
2648                    }
2649                    
2650                    tool_messages.append(tool_message)
2651                    
2652                    # Check if TaskSystemTool was called
2653                    if tool_name == "TaskSystemTool":
2654                        self._handle_task_system_tool(tool_args)
2655                    # Check if WriteBlockReportTool was called
2656                    if tool_name == "WriteBlockReportTool":
2657                        # Mark that we're blocked - this will be checked by the caller
2658                        self.blocked = True
2659                        # Generate block report
2660                        block_report_md = self.create_block_report()
2661                        if block_report_md:
2662                            # Follow the established pattern: modify _current_extracted_content
2663                            if self._current_extracted_content is None:
2664                                self._current_extracted_content = {}
2665                            
2666                            # Add the block report
2667                            self._current_extracted_content["block_report"] = block_report_md
2668                            
2669                            # Update agent_status using the established save_status method
2670                            self.history.agent_status = self.save_status()
2671                    
2672                else:
2673                    # Tool not found
2674                    error_message = {
2675                        "role": "tool", 
2676                        "tool_call_id": tool_id,
2677                        "content": f"Error: Tool '{tool_name}' not found"
2678                    }
2679                    tool_messages.append(error_message)
2680            
2681            except Exception as e:
2682                # Tool execution error
2683                error_message = {
2684                    "role": "tool",
2685                    "tool_call_id": tool_call["id"],
2686                    "content": f"Error executing tool: {str(e)}"
2687                }
2688                tool_messages.append(error_message)
2689        
2690        return tool_messages
2691
2692    def _cleanse_dangling_tool_calls(self, uni_conversation_history: List[Dict], langchain_conversation_history: List[BaseMessage], reason: str = ""):
2693        """Remove dangling tool_calls from the last message in uni_conversation_history only."""
2694        if uni_conversation_history and uni_conversation_history[-1].get("tool_calls"):
2695            if "MULTIPLE_TOOL_CALLS" in reason and len(uni_conversation_history[-1]["tool_calls"]) > 1:
2696                print(f"🔧 CLEANSING {reason}: Keeping only first of {len(uni_conversation_history[-1]['tool_calls'])} tool_calls")
2697                uni_conversation_history[-1]["tool_calls"] = [uni_conversation_history[-1]["tool_calls"][0]]
2698            elif reason == "MAX_TOOL_CALLS":
2699                print(f"🔧 CLEANSING {reason}: Removing {len(uni_conversation_history[-1]['tool_calls'])} dangling tool_calls")
2700                uni_conversation_history[-1] = {
2701                    "role": "assistant", 
2702                    "content": uni_conversation_history[-1].get("content", "")
2703                }
2704
