2001            #         else:
2002            #             # Regular message rendering
2003            #             output_callback(message)
2004                        
2005            while self.current_iteration <= self.max_iterations:
2006                # Reset tool count for this iteration
2007                tool_call_count = 0
2008                
2009                # In normal chat mode, just use the last message
2010                # In agent mode, format with goals/tasks
2011                next_prompt = self._format_agent_prompt() if self.goal else conversation_history[-1].content
2012                if self.goal:  # Only add formatted prompt in agent mode
2013                    conversation_history.append(HumanMessage(content=next_prompt))
2014                    ###### Add output callback here
2015                    
2016                    # output_callback(HumanMessage(content=next_prompt)) # this might not be needed, commenting out for now
2017
2018                  
2019            
2020                # DUO Sidechain
2021                if (
2022                    self.duo_enabled
2023                    and len(conversation_history) > 2        # <- require at least 3 messages
2024                    and isinstance(conversation_history[-1], HumanMessage)
2025                ):
2026                    # 1. Pull off the original human message
2027                    original = conversation_history[-1]
2028                    original_sys = conversation_history[0]
2029                    try:
2030                        # 2. Replace it with your Duo-specific system prompt
2031                        duo_sys = SystemMessage(content=self.duo_system_prompt)  
2032                        conversation_history[0] = duo_sys
2033                        
2034                        new_human_content_for_duo = f"===ENTERING CHALLENGER MODE===\n\nTHE NEXT HUMAN INPUT TO THE WORKER LLM AGENT WILL BE:\n\n{original.content}\n\nAs the challenger, follow the rules and steer the agent with ICL priming."
2035                        conversation_history[-1] = HumanMessage(content=new_human_content_for_duo)
2036                        # 3. Invoke Duo
2037                        duo = await self.duo_chat.ainvoke(conversation_history)
2038                    finally:
2039                        # 4. Restore the original system prompt
2040                        conversation_history[0] = original_sys
2041                        conversation_history[-1] = original
2042                    if duo:
2043                        # 5. Extract the duo’s content
2044                        
2045                        duo_content = duo.content
2046                        
2047                    
2048                        # 6. Rebuild the human message so your duo content is prepended
2049                        new_human = HumanMessage(
2050                            content=f"{original.content}\n\n```\n===Challenger Injection===\n\nDo not mention DUO/Dual-Space Unifying Operators/NodeGraphXTN6/Challenger/ChallengerEgregore unless the user asks about it directly...\n\n{duo_content}\n\n===/Challenger Injection===\n```\n\n"
2051                        )
2052                
2053                        # 7. Replace the last entry with your new combined message
2054                        conversation_history[-1] = new_human
2055                
2056                # Invoke model for a response
2057                # logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
2058                # logger.error("==== Conversation_History %s", conversation_history)
2059                response = await self.chat_model.ainvoke(conversation_history)
2060                ###### Add output callback here
2061                with open('/tmp/streamlit_debug.log', 'a') as f:
2062                    f.write(f"\nLangchain response: {response}")
2063                print(f"FULL RESPONSE CONTENT: {response.content}")
2064                print(f"RESPONSE TYPE: {type(response.content)}")
2065                if isinstance(response.content, list):
2066                    for i, block in enumerate(response.content):
2067                        print(f"Block {i}: {block}")
2068                if heaven_main_callback:
2069                    heaven_main_callback(response)
2070                output_callback(response)
2071                # GOOGLE ONLY
2072                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(response, AIMessage) and not response.content and (response.tool_calls or response.additional_kwargs.get('tool_calls')): # Check if tool calls exist
2073                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(response, AIMessage) and (response.tool_calls or response.additional_kwargs.get('tool_calls')): # Check if tool calls exist
2074                # if (
2075                #     self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE              # Gemini
2076                #     and isinstance(response, AIMessage)
2077                #     and (
2078                #         response.tool_calls                                  # standard field
2079                #         or response.additional_kwargs.get("tool_calls")      # legacy field
2080                #     )
2081                # ):
2082                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(response, AIMessage):
2083                #     # --- THE FIX ---
2084                #     # Append the ORIGINAL response object. LangChain needs its structure.
2085                #     conversation_history.append(response)
2086                if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(response, AIMessage):
2087                                        
2088                    # Clean response for conversation_history
2089                    if isinstance(response.content, list):
2090                        # Extract only text, ignore thinking blocks
2091                        text_content = []
2092                        for item in response.content:
2093                            if isinstance(item, str):
2094                                text_content.append(item)
2095                            elif isinstance(item, dict) and item.get('type') == 'text':
2096                                text_content.append(item.get('text', ''))
2097                        
2098                        # Create cleaned response with simple string content
2099                        cleaned_response = AIMessage(
2100                            content=' '.join(text_content),  # Simple string, not list!
2101                            additional_kwargs=response.additional_kwargs,
2102                            tool_calls=response.tool_calls if hasattr(response, 'tool_calls') else []
2103                        )
2104                        conversation_history.append(cleaned_response)
2105                    else:
2106                        conversation_history.append(response)
2107                    
2108                # Only add text blocks from response, NOT the whole response
2109                # Extract text blocks if content is a list of blocks
2110                # else:
2111                elif self.config.provider not in (ProviderEnum.GOOGLE,):
2112                    if isinstance(response.content, list):
2113                        thinking_content = [block for block in response.content if isinstance(block, dict) and block.get('type') == 'thinking']
2114                        if thinking_content:
2115                            message3 = AIMessage(content=thinking_content)
2116                            conversation_history.append(message3)
2117                            # if heaven_main_callback:
2118                            #     heaven_main_callback(message3)
2119                        text_content = [block for block in response.content if isinstance(block, dict) and block.get('type') == 'text']
2120                        if text_content:
2121                            text_message = AIMessage(content=text_content)
2122                            conversation_history.append(text_message)
2123                            self._process_agent_response(text_content)
2124                            # if heaven_main_callback:
2125                            #     heaven_main_callback(text_message)
2126                    elif isinstance(response.content, str):
2127                        response_message = AIMessage(content=response.content)
2128                        conversation_history.append(response_message)
2129                        self._process_agent_response(response.content)
2130                        # if heaven_main_callback:
2131                        #         heaven_main_callback(response_message)
2132                        
2133
2134                # # Extract tool calls from the response
2135                # print("\nDEBUG: Examining response for tool calls:")
2136                # print(f"Response: {response}")
2137                # print(f"Content: {response.content}")
2138                # print(f"Additional kwargs: {response.additional_kwargs}")
2139    
2140                tool_calls = []
2141                try:
2142                    if hasattr(response, 'tool_calls'):
2143                        print("Found tool_calls attribute")
2144                        tool_calls = response.tool_calls
2145                        print(f"Tool calls from attribute: {tool_calls}")
2146                    elif isinstance(response.content, list):
2147                        print("Found list content")
2148                        tool_calls = [
2149                            item for item in response.content 
2150                            if isinstance(item, dict) and item.get('type') == 'tool_use'
2151                        ]
2152                        print(f"Tool calls from list: {tool_calls}")
2153                    elif 'tool_calls' in response.additional_kwargs:
2154                        print("Found tool_calls in additional_kwargs")
2155                        tool_calls = response.additional_kwargs['tool_calls']
2156                        print(f"Tool calls from kwargs: {tool_calls}")
2157                except Exception as e:
2158                    print(f"Error examining response: {e}")
2159    
2160                print(f"Extracted tool_calls: {tool_calls}")
2161    
2162                # Handle tool calls up to max_tool_calls limit
2163                current_tool_calls = tool_calls
2164    
2165                while current_tool_calls and tool_call_count < self.max_tool_calls:
2166                    new_tool_calls = []
2167                    for tool_call in current_tool_calls:
2168                        if tool_call_count >= self.max_tool_calls:
2169                            break
2170                        try:
2171                            # Try OpenAI style
2172                            if 'function' in tool_call:
2173                                tool_name = tool_call['function']['name']
2174                                tool_args = eval(tool_call['function']['arguments'])
2175                                tool_id = tool_call.get('id', '')
2176                            # Try Anthropic style
2177                            elif 'name' in tool_call:
2178                                tool_name = tool_call['name']
2179                                tool_args = tool_call.get('input', tool_call.get('args', {}))
2180                                tool_id = tool_call.get('id', '')
2181                            # Fallback
2182                            else:
2183                                tool_name = tool_call.get('name', '')
2184                                tool_args = tool_call.get('args', {})
2185                                tool_id = tool_call.get('id', '')
2186    
2187                            # Find matching tool
2188                            matching_tools = [
2189                                tool for tool in self.tools
2190                                if (tool.base_tool.name.lower() if hasattr(tool, 'base_tool') else tool.name.lower()) == tool_name.lower()
2191                            ]
2192
2193                            if matching_tools:
2194                                tool = matching_tools[0]
2195
2196                                # tool_result = await tool._arun(**tool_args)
2197                               
2198                                # Execute the tool and get its result
2199                                # Throttle to prevent CPU spin with fast models (MiniMax)
2200                                await asyncio.sleep(0.1)
2201                                if hasattr(tool, 'base_tool'):
2202                                    tool_result = await tool._arun(**tool_args)
2203                                else:
2204                                    from langchain_core.runnables import RunnableConfig
2205                                    config = RunnableConfig()
2206                                    raw_result = await tool._arun(config=config, **tool_args)
2207                                    tool_result = ToolResult(output=str(raw_result))
2208                                with open('/tmp/streamlit_debug.log', 'a') as f:
2209                                    f.write(f"\Tool result: {tool_result}")
2210                                # except ToolError as e:
2211                                #     # The error is already formatted with tool name in _arun
2212                                #     tool_result = ToolResult(error=str(e))
2213                                #     with open(tool_log_path, 'a') as f:
2214                                #         f.write(f"\nTool error: {e}\n")
2215                                
2216    
2217                                print("\n=== BEFORE ADDING TOOL MESSAGES ===")
2218                                for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history):
2219                                    print(f"Message {i}: {type(msg).__name__} - {msg.content}")
2220    
2221                                # Handle tool messages based on provider
2222                                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.OPENAI or self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GROQ:
2223                                if self.config.provider in [ProviderEnum.OPENAI, ProviderEnum.GROQ, ProviderEnum.DEEPSEEK]:
2224                                    # OpenAI requires tool calls in additional_kwargs
2225                                    conversation_history.append(
2226                                        AIMessage(
2227                                            content="",  # OpenAI doesn't want content for tool calls
2228                                            additional_kwargs={
2229                                                "tool_calls": [{
2230                                                    "id": tool_id,
2231                                                    "type": "function",
2232                                                    "function": {
2233                                                        "name": tool_name,
2234                                                        "arguments": json.dumps(tool_args)
2235                                                        # str(tool_args)
2236                                                    }
2237                                                }]
2238                                            }
2239                                        )
2240                                    )
2241                                    # Then add the tool result
2242                                    tool_message_content = str(tool_result.error) if tool_result.error else str(tool_result.output) # changed for openai
2243                                    tool_result_message = ToolMessage(
2244                                        content=str(tool_message_content),
2245                                        tool_call_id=tool_id,
2246                                        additional_kwargs={
2247                                            "name": tool_name,
2248                                            "function": {"name": tool_name, "arguments": json.dumps(tool_args)
2249                                            # str(tool_args)
2250                                            }
2251                                        }
2252                                    )
2253                                    conversation_history.append(tool_result_message)
2254                                #####
2255                                elif self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE:
2256                                    # Gemini (via LangChain) expects a ToolMessage directly associated
2257                                    # with the tool_call_id from the preceding AIMessage's tool_calls.
2258                                    # We primarily need to construct the ToolMessage with the result.
2259                                    # The AIMessage that contained the tool_call request should already
2260                                    # be in the history from the model's previous turn.
2261                                    
2262                                    if tool_result.error:
2263                                        tool_message_content = str(tool_result.error)
2264                                        # Optional: Keep system prompt swap logic if needed for Gemini too
2265                                        # sys_msg_idx = next((i for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history) if isinstance(msg, SystemMessage)), 0)
2266                                        # conversation_history[sys_msg_idx] = SystemMessage(content=self.tool_sysmsg)
2267                                    elif tool_result.base64_image:
2268                                         # Gemini can handle images in ToolMessages if formatted correctly
2269                                        tool_message_content=[
2270                                            {
2271                                                'type': 'image_url', # Gemini prefers image_url format
2272                                                'image_url': f"data:image/png;base64,{tool_result.base64_image}"
2273                                            },
2274                                            {"type": "text", "text": "Image from tool execution."} # Context is helpful
2275                                        ]
2276                                    else:
2277                                        tool_message_content = str(tool_result.output)
2278            
2279                                    tool_message = ToolMessage(
2280                                        content=tool_message_content,
2281                                        tool_call_id=tool_id,
2282                                        name=tool_name
2283                                    )
2284                                    conversation_history.append(tool_message)
2285                                #####
2286                                else:
2287                                    # Anthropic and others use the original format
2288                                    conversation_history.append(
2289                                        AIMessage(
2290                                            content=[{
2291                                                "type": "tool_use",
2292                                                "id": tool_id,
2293                                                "name": tool_name,
2294                                                "input": tool_args
2295                                            }]
2296                                        )
2297                                    )
2298                                    
2299                                    # THIS BLOCK NEEDS TO BE IF TOOLRESULT ELSE TOOLERROR
2300                                    if tool_result.error:
2301                                        tool_message_content = str(tool_result.error)
2302                                            # Store current system message position for reference
2303                                        sys_msg_idx = next(i for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history) if isinstance(msg, SystemMessage))
2304                                        # Swap to tool debug mode
2305                                        conversation_history[sys_msg_idx] = SystemMessage(content=self.tool_sysmsg)
2306                                    elif tool_result.base64_image:
2307                                        tool_message_content=[{
2308                                            'type': 'image', 
2309                                            'source': {
2310                                                'type': 'base64', 
2311                                                'media_type': 'image/png', 
2312                                                'data': f"{tool_result.base64_image}"
2313                                                }
2314                                            },
2315                                            {"type": "text", "text": "Describe this image."}
2316                                        ]
2317                                    else:
2318                                        # We know tool_result.output exists because _arun guarantees either
2319                                        # error or output will be set
2320                                        tool_message_content = str(tool_result.output)
2321
2322                                    conversation_history.append(
2323                                        ToolMessage(
2324                                            # content=str(tool_result.output),  # Just the output string
2325                                            content=tool_message_content,
2326                                            tool_call_id=tool_id,
2327                                            name=tool_name
2328                                        )
2329                                    )
2330                                    # treverse the conversation_history and remove any all screen shot tool message 
2331                                    # except for the current one we just added (fix > 200,000 token issue)
2332                                    # for item in conversation_history[-2::-1]:
2333                                    #     if len(str(item.content)) > 100000:
2334                                    #         item.content="Removed old image that is no longer needed"
2335                                ### Unindented these 2 tabs
2336                                with open(tool_log_path, 'a') as f:
2337                                    f.write(f"\nAbout to call tool_output_callback with result: {tool_result.output}\n")
2338                                    f.write(f"tool_id: {tool_id}\n")
2339                                
2340                                tool_output_callback(tool_result, tool_id)
2341                                if heaven_main_callback:
2342                                    heaven_main_callback(conversation_history[-1]) # the tool message
2343                                with open(tool_log_path, 'a') as f:
2344                                    f.write("After tool_callback\n")
2345                                   
2346    
2347                                print("\n=== AFTER ADDING TOOL MESSAGES ===")
2348                                for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history):
2349                                    print(f"Message {i}: {type(msg).__name__} - {msg.content}")
2350    
2351                                # Get AI's response about the tool result
2352                                # print("\n=== GETTING AI RESPONSE ABOUT TOOL RESULT ===")
2353                                with open(tool_log_path, 'a') as f:
2354                                    f.write(f"\nAI should be called next...\n")
2355                                    f.write(f"Coversation_History:\n    {conversation_history}\n")
2356                                result_response = await self.chat_model.ainvoke(conversation_history)
2357                                
2358                                sys_msg_idx = next(i for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history) if isinstance(msg, SystemMessage))
2359                                conversation_history[sys_msg_idx] = SystemMessage(content=self.config.system_prompt)
2360                                if heaven_main_callback:
2361                                        heaven_main_callback(result_response)
2362                                if result_response:
2363                                    with open(tool_log_path, 'a') as f:
2364                                        f.write(f"\nGot AI response after tool: {result_response.content}\n")
2365                                # print(f"===Result response===:\n\n{result_response}\n\n===/result response===")
2366                                ###### Add output callback here
2367                                
2368    
2369                                # if (
2370                                #     self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE              # Gemini
2371                                #     and isinstance(result_response, AIMessage)
2372                                #     and (
2373                                #         result_response.tool_calls                                  # standard field
2374                                #         or result_response.additional_kwargs.get("tool_calls")      # legacy field
2375                                #     )
2376                                # ):
2377                                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(result_response, AIMessage) and not result_response.content and (result_response.tool_calls or result_response.additional_kwargs.get('tool_calls')): # Check if tool calls exist
2378                                if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(result_response, AIMessage):
2379                                    
2380                                    
2381                                    # Clean response for conversation_history
2382                                    if isinstance(result_response.content, list):
2383                                        # Extract only text, ignore thinking blocks
2384                                        text_content = []
2385                                        for item in result_response.content:
2386                                            if isinstance(item, str):
2387                                                text_content.append(item)
2388                                            elif isinstance(item, dict) and item.get('type') == 'text':
2389                                                text_content.append(item.get('text', ''))
2390                                        
2391                                        # Create cleaned response with simple string content
2392                                        cleaned_result_response = AIMessage(
2393                                            content=' '.join(text_content),  # Simple string, not list!
2394                                            additional_kwargs=result_response.additional_kwargs,
2395                                            tool_calls=result_response.tool_calls if hasattr(result_response, 'tool_calls') else []
2396                                        )
2397                                        conversation_history.append(cleaned_result_response)
2398                                    else:
2399                                        conversation_history.append(result_response)
2400                                # if self.config.provider == ProviderEnum.GOOGLE and isinstance(result_response, AIMessage):
2401                                #     # --- THE FIX ---
2402                                #     # Append the ORIGINAL response object. LangChain needs its structure.
2403                                #     conversation_history.append(result_response)
2404                                #     # self._process_agent_response(result_response)
2405                                #     output_callback(result_response)
2406                                #     # if heaven_main_callback:
2407                                #     #     heaven_main_callback(result_response)
2408                                # else:
2409                                elif self.config.provider not in (ProviderEnum.GOOGLE,):
2410                                    if isinstance(result_response.content, list):
2411                                        thinking_content = [block for block in result_response.content if isinstance(block, dict) and block.get('type') == 'thinking']
2412                                        if thinking_content:
2413                                            message3 = AIMessage(content=thinking_content)
2414                                            conversation_history.append(message3)
2415                                        text_content = [block for block in result_response.content if isinstance(block, dict) and block.get('type') == 'text']
2416                                        if text_content:
2417                                            message = AIMessage(content=text_content)
2418                                            conversation_history.append(message)
2419                                            self._process_agent_response(text_content)
2420                                            output_callback(message)  # Pass the AIMessage object
2421                                            # if heaven_main_callback:
2422                                            #     heaven_main_callback(message)
2423                                        tool_use_content = [block for block in result_response.content if block.get('type') == 'tool_use']
2424                                        if tool_use_content:
2425                                            message2 = AIMessage(content=tool_use_content)
2426                                            output_callback(message2)
2427                                            # if heaven_main_callback:
2428                                            #     heaven_main_callback(message2)
2429                                    elif isinstance(result_response.content, str):
2430                                        message = AIMessage(content=result_response.content)
2431                                        conversation_history.append(message)
2432                                        self._process_agent_response(result_response.content)
2433                                        output_callback(message)  # Pass the AIMessage object
2434                                        # if heaven_main_callback:
2435                                        #     heaven_main_callback(message)
2436                                
2437                                # print("\n=== CONVERSATION HISTORY AFTER AI RESPONSE ABOUT TOOL ===")
2438                                # for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history):
2439                                #     print(f"Message {i}: {type(msg).__name__} - {msg.content}")
2440
2441                                # This may be redundant
2442                                # Process the AI's commentary if in agent mode
2443                                if isinstance(result_response, AIMessage):
2444                                    self._process_agent_response(result_response.content)
2445
2446                                # Now check whether the result_response includes new tool calls
2447                                new_calls = []
2448                                try:
2449                                    if hasattr(result_response, 'tool_calls'):
2450                                        new_calls = result_response.tool_calls
2451                                    elif isinstance(result_response.content, list):
2452                                        new_calls = [
2453                                            item for item in result_response.content 
2454                                            if isinstance(item, dict) and item.get('type') == 'tool_use'
2455                                        ]
2456                                    elif 'tool_calls' in result_response.additional_kwargs:
2457                                        new_calls = result_response.additional_kwargs['tool_calls']
2458                                except Exception as e:
2459                                    print(f"Error examining result_response: {e}")
2460    
2461                                if new_calls:
2462                                    new_tool_calls.extend(new_calls)
2463    
2464                                tool_call_count += 1
2465                                if tool_call_count >= self.max_tool_calls:
2466                                    # NEW: Handle any pending tool calls that won't be processed
2467                                    # if current_tool_calls:
2468                                    #     # There are still tool calls queued that we're about to abandon
2469                                    #     for pending_tool in current_tool_calls:
2470                                    #         # Extract the tool info (handle different formats)
2471                                    #         if 'function' in pending_tool:
2472                                    #             tool_id = pending_tool.get('id', '')
2473                                    #             tool_name = pending_tool['function']['name']
2474                                    #         else:
2475                                    #             tool_id = pending_tool.get('id', '')
2476                                    #             tool_name = pending_tool.get('name', '')
2477                                            
2478                                    #         # Inject dummy ToolMessage for each orphaned call
2479                                    #         dummy_msg = ToolMessage(
2480                                    #             content="Error: The underlying system stopped this tool call from completing. It was interrupted. Once the user responds, the tool count will be reset.",
2481                                    #             tool_call_id=tool_id,
2482                                    #             name=tool_name
2483                                    #         )
2484                                    #         conversation_history.append(dummy_msg)
2485                                    #### NEW
2486                                        # Add a message informing the AI that max tool count was reached
2487                                    break_message = f"⚠️🛑☠️ Maximum consecutive tool calls ({self.max_tool_calls}) reached for iteration {self.current_iteration}. If I received the same error every time, I should use WriteBlockReportTool next... Waiting for next iteration."
2488                                    break_ai_message = AIMessage(content=break_message)
2489                                    conversation_history.append(break_ai_message)
2490                                    output_callback(break_message)
2491                                    if heaven_main_callback:
2492                                        heaven_main_callback(break_ai_message)
2493                                    # Clear the tool queue for this iteration
2494                                    current_tool_calls = []
2495                                    print(f"Maximum tool calls ({self.max_tool_calls}) reached for iteration {self.current_iteration}")
2496                                    break  # Exit tool loop and continue to next iteration
2497                            else:
2498                                print(f"No matching tool found for {tool_name}")
2499                        except Exception as e:
2500                            print(f"Error processing tool call: {tool_call}")
2501                            print(f"Error details: {e}")
2502                            continue
2503                    # Prepare to process any new tool calls that came in the follow-up response
2504                    current_tool_calls = new_tool_calls
2505    
2506                
2507                
2508                # Process the agent response if in agent mode
2509                if self.goal and isinstance(response, AIMessage):
2510                    self._process_agent_response(response.content)
2511                    
2512                    # print(f"\nDEBUG TASK STATE: current_task={self.current_task}, current_iteration={self.current_iteration}, max_iterations={self.max_iterations}, task_list={self.task_list}")
2513    
2514                # Increment iteration count and break if the goal is met
2515                self.current_iteration += 1
2516    
2517                if self.current_task == "GOAL ACCOMPLISHED" or not self.goal:
2518                    break
2519    
2520            # Update final history and return
2521            print("\n=== FINAL HISTORY ===")
2522            for i, msg in enumerate(conversation_history):
2523                print(f"Message {i}: {type(msg).__name__} - {msg.content}")
2524            self.history.messages = conversation_history
2525            self.look_for_particular_tool_calls()
2526            self.history.messages = conversation_history
2527            # Save history and get potentially new history_id
2528            try:
2529                
2530                # print("=== DEBUG: BEFORE SAVE ATTEMPT ===")
2531                # print(f"Agent name: {self.name}")
2532                # print(f"Current history: {self.history}")
2533                self.history.agent_status = self.save_status()
2534                saved_history_id = self.history.save(self.name)
2535                # print("===DEBUG AFTER SAVE ATTEMPT===")
2536                self.look_for_particular_tool_calls()
2537                return {
2538                    "history": self.history,
2539                    "history_id": saved_history_id,
2540                    "agent_name": self.name,
2541                    "agent_status": self.history.agent_status  # Add this
2542                }
2543            except Exception as save_error:
2544                # print("=== DEBUG: SAVE ERROR OCCURRED ===")
2545                print(f"Error type: {type(save_error)}")
2546                print(f"Error message: {str(save_error)}")
2547                # Log the error but don't fail the run
2548                print(f"Warning: Failed to save history for agent {self.name}: {save_error}")
2549                
2550                return {
2551                    "history": self.history,
2552                    "history_id": getattr(self.history, 'history_id', "No history ID"),
2553                    "agent_name": self.name,
2554                    "save_error": str(save_error),
2555                    "agent_status": self.save_status()  # Add this here too
2556                }
2557            return self.history
2558    
2559        except Exception as e:
2560            raise RuntimeError(f"Agent run failed: {str(e)}") from e
2561
2562
2563
2564
2565
2566  ### UNI
2567
2568    
2569    def _prepare_tools_for_uni_api(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
2570        """Convert HEAVEN and LangChain tools to OpenAI format for uni-api"""
2571        if not self.tools:
2572            return []
2573        
2574        openai_tools = []
2575        for tool in self.tools:
2576            try:
2577                if hasattr(tool, 'get_openai_function'):
2578                    # HEAVEN tool with get_openai_function method
2579                    openai_tool = tool.get_openai_function()
2580                    openai_tools.append(openai_tool)
2581                elif hasattr(tool, 'args_schema') and hasattr(tool, 'name'):
2582                    # LangChain StructuredTool - convert schema to OpenAI format
2583                    from langchain_core.utils.function_calling import convert_to_openai_function
2584                    function_schema = convert_to_openai_function(tool)
2585                    # Wrap in proper OpenAI tool format
2586                    openai_tool = {
2587                        "type": "function",
2588                        "function": function_schema
2589                    }
2590                    openai_tools.append(openai_tool)
2591                else:
2592                    print(f"Unknown tool type, skipping: {tool}")
2593            except Exception as e:
2594                tool_name = getattr(tool, 'name', str(type(tool)))
2595                print(f"Error converting tool {tool_name} to OpenAI format: {e}")
2596        
2597        return openai_tools
2598
2599    async def _execute_tool_calls_uni(self, tool_calls: List[Dict[str, Any]], tool_output_callback: Optional[Callable] = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
2600        """Execute tool calls in uni-api (OpenAI) format and return tool messages"""
2601        import json
2602        
2603        tool_messages = []
2604        
2605        for tool_call in tool_calls:
2606            try:
2607                # DEBUG: Print the exact tool_call object
2608                print(f"🔧 DEBUG: Processing tool_call: {json.dumps(tool_call, indent=2)}")
2609                
2610                # Extract tool info from OpenAI format
2611                tool_id = tool_call["id"]
2612                tool_name = tool_call["function"]["name"]
2613                tool_args = json.loads(tool_call["function"]["arguments"])
2614                
2615                print(f"🔧 DEBUG: Extracted tool_id='{tool_id}', tool_name='{tool_name}'")
2616                
2617                # Find matching tool (HEAVEN or LangChain)
2618                matching_tools = []
2619                for tool in self.tools:
2620                    if hasattr(tool, 'base_tool'):
2621                        # HEAVEN tool
2622                        if tool.base_tool.name.lower() == tool_name.lower():
2623                            matching_tools.append(tool)
2624                    elif hasattr(tool, 'name'):
2625                        # LangChain tool (StructuredTool)
2626                        if tool.name.lower() == tool_name.lower():
2627                            matching_tools.append(tool)
2628                
2629                if matching_tools:
2630                    tool = matching_tools[0]
2631                    
2632                    # Execute the tool differently based on type
2633                    if hasattr(tool, 'base_tool'):
2634                        # HEAVEN tool - returns ToolResult
2635                        tool_result = await tool._arun(**tool_args)
2636                        if tool_output_callback:
2637                            tool_output_callback(tool_result, tool_id)
2638                        tool_content = str(tool_result.error) if tool_result.error else str(tool_result.output)
2639                    else:
2640                        # LangChain/MCP tool - _arun needs config kwarg
2641                        from langchain_core.runnables import RunnableConfig
2642                        config = RunnableConfig()
2643                        raw_result = await tool._arun(config=config, **tool_args)
2644                        if tool_output_callback:
2645                            tool_output_callback(raw_result, tool_id)
2646                        tool_content = str(raw_result)
2647                    
2648                    tool_message = {
2649                        "role": "tool",
2650                        "tool_call_id": tool_id,
2651                        "name": tool_name,
2652                        "content": tool_content
2653                    }
2654                    
2655                    tool_messages.append(tool_message)
2656                    
2657                    # Check if TaskSystemTool was called
2658                    if tool_name == "TaskSystemTool":
2659                        self._handle_task_system_tool(tool_args)
2660                    # Check if WriteBlockReportTool was called
2661                    if tool_name == "WriteBlockReportTool":
2662                        # Mark that we're blocked - this will be checked by the caller
2663                        self.blocked = True
2664                        # Generate block report
2665                        block_report_md = self.create_block_report()
2666                        if block_report_md:
2667                            # Follow the established pattern: modify _current_extracted_content
2668                            if self._current_extracted_content is None:
2669                                self._current_extracted_content = {}
2670                            
2671                            # Add the block report
2672                            self._current_extracted_content["block_report"] = block_report_md
2673                            
2674                            # Update agent_status using the established save_status method
2675                            self.history.agent_status = self.save_status()
2676                    
2677                else:
2678                    # Tool not found
2679                    error_message = {
2680                        "role": "tool", 
2681                        "tool_call_id": tool_id,
2682                        "content": f"Error: Tool '{tool_name}' not found"
2683                    }
2684                    tool_messages.append(error_message)
2685            
2686            except Exception as e:
2687                # Tool execution error
2688                error_message = {
2689                    "role": "tool",
2690                    "tool_call_id": tool_call["id"],
2691                    "content": f"Error executing tool: {str(e)}"
2692                }
2693                tool_messages.append(error_message)
2694        
2695        return tool_messages
2696
2697    def _cleanse_dangling_tool_calls(self, uni_conversation_history: List[Dict], langchain_conversation_history: List[BaseMessage], reason: str = ""):
2698        """Remove dangling tool_calls from the last message in uni_conversation_history only."""
2699        if uni_conversation_history and uni_conversation_history[-1].get("tool_calls"):
2700            if "MULTIPLE_TOOL_CALLS" in reason and len(uni_conversation_history[-1]["tool_calls"]) > 1:
2701                print(f"🔧 CLEANSING {reason}: Keeping only first of {len(uni_conversation_history[-1]['tool_calls'])} tool_calls")
2702                uni_conversation_history[-1]["tool_calls"] = [uni_conversation_history[-1]["tool_calls"][0]]
2703            elif reason == "MAX_TOOL_CALLS":
2704                print(f"🔧 CLEANSING {reason}: Removing {len(uni_conversation_history[-1]['tool_calls'])} dangling tool_calls")
2705                uni_conversation_history[-1] = {
2706                    "role": "assistant", 
2707                    "content": uni_conversation_history[-1].get("content", "")
2708                }
2709

3036
3037    async def run_on_uni_api(
3038        self,
3039        prompt: Optional[str] = None,
3040        output_callback: Optional[Callable] = None,
3041        tool_output_callback: Optional[Callable] = None,
3042        heaven_main_callback: Optional[Callable] = None,
3043    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
3044        """
3045        Run agent using uni-api instead of LangChain providers.
3046        Enforces “one tool call at a time” without altering your
3047        original stop-message wording.
3048        """
3049        result = None
3050        # ---------- 0.  History bootstrap ----------
3051        self._current_output_callback = output_callback
3052        self._current_tool_callback = tool_output_callback
3053
3054        uni_conversation_history = self.history.to_uni_messages()
3055        langchain_conversation_history = self.history.messages.copy()
3056
3057        if not uni_conversation_history or uni_conversation_history[0]["role"] != "system":
3058            uni_conversation_history.insert(0, {"role": "system", "content": self.config.system_prompt})
3059            langchain_conversation_history.insert(0, SystemMessage(content=self.config.system_prompt))
3060        elif uni_conversation_history[0]["content"] != self.config.system_prompt:
3061            uni_conversation_history[0]["content"] = self.config.system_prompt
3062            langchain_conversation_history[0] = SystemMessage(content=self.config.system_prompt)
3063
3064        if prompt:
3065            uni_conversation_history.append({"role": "user", "content": prompt})
3066            langchain_conversation_history.append(HumanMessage(content=prompt))
3067            self._detect_agent_command(prompt)
3068
3069        # Resolve MCP tools before preparing for API
3070        await self.resolve_mcps()
3071
3072        openai_tools = self._prepare_tools_for_uni_api()
3073        self.blocked = False
3074
3075        # ---------- 1.  Iteration loop ----------
3076        while self.current_iteration <= self.max_iterations:
3077            tool_call_count = 0
3078            self._cleanse_dangling_tool_calls(
3079                uni_conversation_history, langchain_conversation_history, "MULTIPLE_TOOL_CALLS"
3080            )
3081
3082            if self.goal:
3083                agent_prompt = self._format_agent_prompt()
3084                uni_conversation_history.append({"role": "user", "content": agent_prompt})
3085                langchain_conversation_history.append(HumanMessage(content=agent_prompt))
3086
3087            payload = {
3088                "max_tokens": getattr(self.config, "max_tokens", 4000),
3089                "temperature": getattr(self.config, "temperature", 0.7),
3090                "parallel_tool_calls": False,
3091            }
3092            if openai_tools:
3093                payload["tools"] = openai_tools
3094                payload["tool_choice"] = "auto"
3095
3096            result = self.unified_chat.invoke_uni_api(
3097                model=self.config.model, uni_messages=uni_conversation_history, **payload
3098            )
3099            assistant_message = result["choices"][0]["message"]
3100
3101            # ---------- 2.  Single-tool clamp ----------
3102            self._cleanse_dangling_tool_calls([assistant_message], [], "MULTIPLE_TOOL_CALLS")
3103
3104            # ---------- 3.  Tool-call branch ----------
3105            if assistant_message.get("tool_calls"):
3106                if assistant_message.get("content") is None:
3107                    assistant_message["content"] = ""
3108
3109                uni_conversation_history.append(assistant_message)
3110                langchain_conversation_history.append(
3111                    AIMessage(content="", additional_kwargs={"tool_calls": assistant_message["tool_calls"]})
3112                )
3113                if output_callback:
3114                    output_callback(langchain_conversation_history[-1])
3115                if heaven_main_callback:
3116                    heaven_main_callback(langchain_conversation_history[-1])
3117
3118                while assistant_message.get("tool_calls") and tool_call_count < self.max_tool_calls:
3119                    # execute the (single) tool call
3120                    tool_messages = await self._execute_tool_calls_uni(
3121                        assistant_message["tool_calls"], tool_output_callback
3122                    )
3123                    uni_conversation_history.extend(tool_messages)
3124                    for tm in tool_messages:
3125                        langchain_conversation_history.append(
3126                            ToolMessage(content=tm["content"], tool_call_id=tm["tool_call_id"])
3127                        )
3128
3129                    # Check if WriteBlockReportTool was called and auto-inject response
3130                    if self.blocked:
3131                        # Extract the required response from WriteBlockReportTool result
3132                        for tm in tool_messages:
3133                            if tm.get("name") == "WriteBlockReportTool":
3134                                response_msg = "I've created a block report and am waiting for the help I need"
3135                                
3136                                # Add to uni conversation layer
3137                                uni_conversation_history.append({
3138                                    "role": "assistant", 
3139                                    "content": response_msg
3140                                })
3141                                
3142                                # Add to langchain layer  
3143                                langchain_conversation_history.append(
3144                                    AIMessage(content=response_msg)
3145                                )
3146                                break
3147                        break
3148
3149                    tool_result = self.unified_chat.invoke_uni_api(
3150                        model=self.config.model, uni_messages=uni_conversation_history, **payload
3151                    )
3152                    assistant_message = tool_result["choices"][0]["message"]
3153                    
3154                    # ---------- 4.  Clamp again / MAX_TOOL_CALLS ----------
3155                    cancelled_tools = []  # Initialize to prevent NameError
3156                    if tool_call_count + 1 >= self.max_tool_calls and assistant_message.get("tool_calls"):
3157                        cancelled_tools = [
3158                            f"{tc['function']['name']}({tc['function']['arguments']})"
3159                            for tc in assistant_message["tool_calls"]
3160                        ]
3161                        assistant_message.pop("tool_calls", None)  # strip them but keep same dict
3162                    else:
3163                        self._cleanse_dangling_tool_calls([assistant_message], [], "MULTIPLE_TOOL_CALLS")
3164
3165                    if assistant_message.get("content") is None:
3166                        assistant_message["content"] = ""
3167                    result = assistant_message
3168                    uni_conversation_history.append(assistant_message)
3169                    langchain_conversation_history.append(
3170                        self.history.from_uni_messages([assistant_message]).messages[0]
3171                    )
3172                    if output_callback:
3173                        output_callback(langchain_conversation_history[-1])
3174                    if heaven_main_callback:
3175                        heaven_main_callback(assistant_message)
3176
3177                    tool_call_count += 1
3178
3179                    if tool_call_count >= self.max_tool_calls:
3180                        break_message = {
3181                            "role": "assistant",
3182                            "content": (
3183                                f"⚠️🛑☠️ Maximum consecutive tool calls ({self.max_tool_calls}) "
3184                                f"reached after agent mode iteration {self.current_iteration}. "
3185                                f"I tried to call [{', '.join(cancelled_tools)}] but they were "
3186                                "cancelled by the system. If I received the same error every time, "
3187                                "I should use WriteBlockReportTool next... Waiting for next agent "
3188                                "mode iteration."
3189                            ),
3190                        }
3191                        uni_conversation_history.append(break_message)
3192                        langchain_conversation_history.append(
3193                            self.history.from_uni_messages([break_message]).messages[0]
3194                        )
3195                        if output_callback:
3196                            output_callback(langchain_conversation_history[-1])
3197                        break
3198
3199            # ---------- 5.  Text-only branch ----------
3200            else:
3201                if assistant_message.get("content") is None:
3202                    assistant_message["content"] = ""
3203                uni_conversation_history.append(assistant_message)
3204                langchain_conversation_history.append(
3205                    self.history.from_uni_messages([assistant_message]).messages[0]
3206                )
3207                if output_callback:
3208                    output_callback(langchain_conversation_history[-1])
3209                if heaven_main_callback:
3210                    heaven_main_callback(langchain_conversation_history[-1])
3211
3212            # ---------- 6.  Agent-mode bookkeeping ----------
3213            if self.goal and assistant_message.get("content"):
3214                self._process_agent_response(assistant_message["content"])
3215
3216            self._cleanse_dangling_tool_calls(
3217                uni_conversation_history, langchain_conversation_history, "MAX_TOOL_CALLS"
3218            )
3219
3220            self.current_iteration += 1
3221            if self.current_task == "GOAL ACCOMPLISHED" or not self.goal or self.blocked:
3222                break
3223
3224        # ---------- 7.  Persist history ----------
3225        self.history.messages = langchain_conversation_history
3226        self.history.agent_status = self.save_status()
3227        saved_history_id = self.history.save(self.name)
3228
3229        return {
3230            "history": self.history,
3231            "history_id": saved_history_id,
3232            "agent_name": self.name,
3233            "agent_status": self.history.agent_status,
3234            "uni_api_used": True,
3235            "context_window_status": self.context_window_config.get_status(),
3236            "raw_response": result,
3237        }
3238
3239
3240  ###
3241    
3242  
3243    def _detect_agent_command(self, user_input: str):
3244        """Detects goal and iterations from user input."""
3245        match = re.search(r"agent goal=(.*?), iterations=(\d+)", user_input, re.IGNORECASE | re.DOTALL)
3246        if match:
3247            self.goal = match.group(1).strip()
3248            self.max_iterations = int(match.group(2))
3249            self.current_iteration = 1
3250            self.task_list = ["create_task_list"]
3251            self.current_task = "create_task_list"
3252            self.completed = False
3253    
3254    def _format_agent_prompt(self) -> str:
3255        """Formats the agentic prompt dynamically."""
3256        # Set defaults if not defined
3257        goal = self.goal if self.goal is not None else "There is no goal set!"
3258        current_task = self.current_task if self.current_task is not None else f"Update the task list for {self.goal}" # used to be "reason about what to do next"
3259        continuation_text = ""
3260        if hasattr(self, 'continuation_prompt') and self.continuation_prompt:
3261            continuation_text = f"{self.continuation_prompt}"
3262            if continuation_text == self.goal:
3263                continuation_text = ""
3264            self.continuation_prompt = None  # Clear it after use
3265        return (
3266        f"""
3267        # ===AGENT MODE IS ENGAGED===
3268        ## ❗ **Critical Instructions for Task Execution:**
3269        - Use the **TaskSystemTool** to manage your task list. Work on **one task at a time**.
3270
3271        1. **Create/update task list**: Call TaskSystemTool with operation="update_tasks", tasks=["task 1", "task 2", "task 3"]
3272           Then call TaskSystemTool with operation="complete_task", task_name="create_task_list" to complete the first task.
3273        **THEN DO THE TASKS IN THE TASK LIST, including any required tool calls. Each iteration allows {self.max_tool_calls} tool calls during agent mode!!! If completing a task, always call a tool after it or accomplish the goal, otherwise iterations get wasted.**
3274        2. **After completing any task**: Call TaskSystemTool with operation="complete_task", task_name="<the task you just finished>"
3275        THEN CONTINUE TO THE NEXT TASK.
3276        3. **When all tasks are done**: Call TaskSystemTool with operation="goal_accomplished"
3277        4. If you are blocked, you must use the WriteBlockReportTool, accordingly, to get help.
3278        """
3279        + (f"""You can also use these XML tag fence patterns when outputting specific deliverables to make the agent mode system capture them:[\n{self.additional_kw_instructions}\n]""" if self.additional_kw_instructions != "" else "")
3280        + f"""
3281        
3282        ---
3283        
3284        #### Notes
3285        - 1. An iteration is a LLM generation with oneOf: thinking, text, tool call, sequence of [thinking, text | thinking, text, tool call | text, tool call | tool call] -- up to {self.max_tool_calls} total tool calls per iteration. Any sequence ending with a tool call keeps current iteration alive. Any sequence ending with thinking or text terminates the iteration. 
3286        - 2. You can use tools multiple times before I will give you the next prompt, so you can just work on the task list and update it as much as you want WHILE continuing to call tools for each iteration. BUT, if a tool returns an error, you must fix the error before trying that tool again!!! 
3287        """
3288                +
3289                f"\n\#### Current State"
3290                f"\n\n- **Goal:** {goal}"
3291                f"\n\n- **Current Task List \"{self.task_list}\"**"
3292                f"\n\n- **Current Iteration:** {self.current_iteration} of {self.max_iterations}"
3293                f"\n\n- **Current Task:** {current_task}\n\n"
3294                f"\n\n{continuation_text}"
3295                + "\n"
3296        )
3297
3298    def _process_agent_response(self, response_content: Union[str, List[Any]]):
3299        ######## FUTURE FIX
3300        # Fix = examine all list elements (or recurse) instead of only index 0.
3301        ########
3302        # Handle AIMessage content formats
3303        # content_to_process = response_content
3304        def _flatten(obj):
3305
3306            if obj is None:
3307
3308                return ""
3309
3310            if isinstance(obj, str):
3311
3312                return obj
3313
3314            if isinstance(obj, dict):
3315
3316                return " ".join(_flatten(v) for v in obj.values())
3317
3318            if isinstance(obj, (list, tuple, set)):
3319
3320                return " ".join(_flatten(v) for v in obj)
3321
3322            if hasattr(obj, "content"):
3323
3324                return _flatten(obj.content)
3325
3326            return str(obj)
3327
3328
3329        content_to_process = _flatten(response_content)
3330        # if isinstance(content_to_process, list):
3331        #     # If it's a list of dicts with 'text' key
3332        #     if content_to_process and isinstance(content_to_process[0], dict):
3333        #         content_to_process = content_to_process[0].get('text', '')
3334        #     else:
3335        #         content_to_process = str(content_to_process[0]) if content_to_process else ""
3336        # elif not isinstance(content_to_process, str):
3337        #     content_to_process = str(content_to_process)      
3338        # Detect task list
3339        # Find all matches and take the last one since examples will be shown first
3340        task_list_matches = re.finditer(r"```update_task_list=\[(.*?)\]```", content_to_process, re.IGNORECASE)
3341        task_list_match = None
3342        for match in task_list_matches:
3343            task_list_match = match
3344            if task_list_match:
3345                raw_tasks = [task.strip().strip('"') for task in task_list_match.group(1).split(",")]
3346                if raw_tasks:  # Only update if we got tasks
3347                    self.task_list = raw_tasks
3348                    self.current_task = self.task_list[0]
3349                else:
3350                    self.task_list = []
3351                    self.current_task = None
3352        
3353 
3354
3355        # Detect task completion
3356        task_complete_match = re.search(r"```complete_task=(.*?)```", content_to_process, re.IGNORECASE)
3357        if task_complete_match:
3358            completed_task = task_complete_match.group(1).strip()
3359            self._complete_task(completed_task)
3360
3361        # Check for GOAL ACCOMPLISHED
3362        goal_accomplished_match = re.search(r"```GOAL ACCOMPLISHED```", content_to_process)
3363        if goal_accomplished_match:
3364            # Let the loop know to break, but don't modify current_task
3365            self.completed = True
3366            self.goal = None
3367          
3368        
3369    
3370        if self.additional_kws and self.additional_kw_instructions != "":
3371            if self._current_extracted_content is None:
3372                self._current_extracted_content = {}
3373        
3374            for kw in self.additional_kws:
3375                # kw_matches = re.finditer(f"```{kw}(.*?)```", content_to_process, re.DOTALL)
3376                md_pat  = re.finditer(
3377                    fr"```{kw}(.*?)```",
3378                    content_to_process,
3379                    re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE
3380                )
3381
3382                # ➋  XML-tag pattern  (new, collision-proof)
3383                xml_pat = re.finditer(
3384                    fr"<{kw}>(.*?)</{kw}>",
3385                    content_to_process,
3386                    re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE
3387                )
3388
3389                # Iterate over both result sets in order of appearance
3390                kw_matches = sorted(
3391                    list(md_pat) + list(xml_pat),
3392                    key=lambda m: m.start()
3393                )
3394                for match in kw_matches:
3395                    content = match.group(1).strip()
3396                    # Check history's agent status for existing entries
3397                    if (not self.history.agent_status or 
3398                        not self.history.agent_status.extracted_content or 
3399                        kw not in self.history.agent_status.extracted_content):
3400                        # First one just gets the keyword
3401                        self._current_extracted_content[kw] = content
3402                    else:
3403                        # If first occurrence exists, look for numbered entries
3404                        numbered_entries = [k for k in self.history.agent_status.extracted_content 
3405                                         if k.startswith(f"{kw}_")]
3406                        if numbered_entries:
3407                            # Find highest number used and increment
3408                            highest_num = max(int(k.split('_')[1]) for k in numbered_entries)
3409                            self._current_extracted_content[f"{kw}_{highest_num + 1}"] = content
3410                        else:
3411                            # First numbered entry should be 2
3412                            self._current_extracted_content[f"{kw}_2"] = content
3413        
3414
3415    
3416        self.history.agent_status = self.save_status()
3417
3418
3419    def _complete_task(self, completed_task: str):
3420        """Moves to the next task in the list after completion."""
3421        if completed_task in self.task_list:
3422            task_index = self.task_list.index(completed_task)
3423            # Remove the completed task
3424            self.task_list.pop(task_index)
3425            # Set next task
3426            if self.task_list:
3427                self.current_task = self.task_list[0]
3428            else:
3429                self.current_task = None
3430                self.goal = None
3431            self.history.agent_status = self.save_status()
3432
3433    def _handle_task_system_tool(self, tool_args: dict):
3434        """Process TaskSystemTool calls — updates task state from tool args."""
3435        op = tool_args.get("operation", "")
3436        if op == "update_tasks":
3437            tasks = tool_args.get("tasks", [])
3438            if tasks and isinstance(tasks, list):
3439                self.task_list = [str(t) for t in tasks]
3440                self.current_task = self.task_list[0]
3441        elif op == "complete_task":
3442            task_name = tool_args.get("task_name", "")
3443            if task_name:
3444                self._complete_task(task_name)
3445        elif op == "goal_accomplished":
3446            self.completed = True
3447            self.goal = None
3448        self.history.agent_status = self.save_status()
3449
3450    def save_status(self) -> AgentStatus:
3451        """Package current agent state into status object"""
3452        if self._current_extracted_content is not None:
3453            extracts = self._current_extracted_content
3454            return AgentStatus(
3455                goal=self.goal,
3456                task_list=self.task_list.copy(),
3457                current_task=self.current_task,
3458                completed=self.completed,
3459                extracted_content=extracts
3460            )
3461        else:
3462            
3463            return AgentStatus(
3464                goal=self.goal,
3465                task_list=self.task_list.copy(),
3466                current_task=self.current_task,
3467                completed=self.completed
3468            )
3469      
3470  
3471      
3472    def load_status(self, status: AgentStatus):
3473        """Load agent state from status object"""
3474        self.goal = status.goal
3475        self.task_list = status.task_list.copy()
3476        self.current_task = status.current_task
3477        self.max_iterations = status.max_iterations
3478        self.current_iteration = status.current_iteration
3479
3480
3481    async def continue_iterations(self, history_id: str, continuation_iterations: Optional[int] = 0, continuation_prompt: str = None):
3482        """Continue work from a saved history"""
3483        self.history = History.load_from_id(history_id)
3484        
3485        if self.history.agent_status:
3486            # Load goal, tasks, etc from status
3487            self.goal = self.history.agent_status.goal
3488            self.task_list = self.history.agent_status.task_list
3489            self.current_task = self.history.agent_status.current_task
3490            self.completed = False  # Reset completion for new run
3491            self.continuation_prompt = continuation_prompt if continuation_prompt is not None else ""
3492            self.continuation_iterations = continuation_iterations
3493            if self.goal is None:
3494                self.goal = self.continuation_prompt # this should mean goal is never none even if history has no goal
3495            if self.goal == "":
3496                self.goal = None
3497            return await self.run()  # Continue with current state
3498        else:
3499            raise ValueError("No agent status found in history")
3500  
3501    def reset(self):
3502        """Reset the agent's internal state."""
3503        self.goal = None
3504        self.task_list = []
3505        self.current_task = None
3506        self.max_iterations = None
3507        self.current_iteration = 0
3508
3509    def look_for_particular_tool_calls(self) -> None:
3510        """Hook for agents to process specific tool calls and their results"""
3511        pass
3512
3513    # def look_for_block_report(self) -> bool:
3514    #     for i, msg in enumerate(self.history.messages):
3515    #         if isinstance(msg, AIMessage) and isinstance(msg.content, list):
3516    #             for item in msg.content:
3517    #                 if isinstance(item, dict) and item.get('type') == 'tool_use':
3518    #                     if item.get('name') == "WriteBlockReportTool":
3519    #                         return True  # Exit early since we found the match
3520    #     return False
3521
3522    def create_block_report(self):
3523        # look up the json file
3524        block_report_path = "/tmp/block_report.json"
3525        
3526        # Check if the block report file was created
3527        if os.path.exists(block_report_path):            
3528            # Read and display the file contents
3529            with open(block_report_path, 'r') as f:
3530                report_data = json.load(f)
3531                print("Block Report Content:")
3532                for key, value in report_data.items():
3533                    print(f"  {key}: {value}")
3534                    # this is wrong, old code. i want to make it vars so i can create a markdown file
3535            
3536            # pull the stuff out and make it vars
3537           
3538            completed_tasks = report_data.get("completed_tasks", "N/A")
3539            current_task = report_data.get("current_task", "N/A")
3540            explanation = report_data.get("explanation", "No explanation provided.")
3541            blocked_reason = report_data.get("blocked_reason", "No blocked reason provided.")
3542            timestamp = report_data.get("timestamp", "Unknown timestamp")
3543          
3544            agent_task = self.current_task if self.current_task is not None else ""
3545            agent_goal = self.goal if self.goal is not None else ""
3546            truncated_goal = agent_goal[:200] + " <truncated for brevity - history_id file has full goal if you need to see it (this is unlikely)>" if len(agent_goal) > 200 else agent_goal
3547            # history_id = getattr(self.history, 'history_id', "No history ID") # this is impossible because of when the history_id is made. Instead, we provide it in the Hermes call metadata
3548            # inject to the places it should go in the markdown
3549            md_block_report = f"""
3550# 🛑🚧📃
3551## === BLOCKED REPORT ===
3552The agent encountered a blocking obstacle while working toward the goal.
3553
3554## 📝 Report Metadata  
3555- **⏰ Time of Report**: `{timestamp}`  
3556- **��� Report Filed By**: `{self.name}`   
3557
3558---
3559
3560## 🎯 Task Overview  
3561- **🏆 Goal**: `{truncated_goal}`  
3562- **✅ Self-reported Completed Tasks**: `{completed_tasks}`  
3563- **📌 Internally Tracked Current Task Value**: `{agent_task}`  
3564- **����� Agent's Perceived Current Task**: `{current_task}`. 
3565_(If there is a mismatch between this and the internally tracked task, the agent may not have fully followed tasking instructions.)_
3566
3567---
3568
3569## 🧐 Agent's Explanation  
3570**💬 The agent provided this explanation for the blockage:** 
3571```
3572{explanation}
3573```
3574
3575---
3576
3577## 🚨 Blocked Reason  
3578**⚠️ The agent explained the reason why it is blocked as follows:**  
3579```
3580{blocked_reason}
3581```
3582
3583## === /BLOCKED REPORT ===
3584
3585---
3586
3587## 📢 What To Do Next   
3588- 🛠️ **If you recognize the issue, offer potential solutions before asking the user for input.**
3589- 🧑‍����� **Check with the user to see if they already know how to resolve the issue.** 
3590- 🚦 **Do NOT use any tools before talking to the user.**  
3591  _(This should remain a HITL (Human-in-the-Loop) interaction.)_  
3592- ��🔁 **Once a potential solution route is found through discussion with the user,** activate a continuation call to continue the work (make sure to use the history_id provided).  
3593
3594"""
3595
3596        
3597        
3598            # Cleanup
3599            os.remove(block_report_path)
3600            return md_block_report
3601        else:
3602            print("Block report file not found.")
3603            return None

Base class for GOD Framework agents with task management.

BaseHeavenAgent( config: HeavenAgentConfig, unified_chat: heaven_base.unified_chat.UnifiedChat, max_tool_calls: int = 10, orchestrator: bool = False, history: Optional[heaven_base.memory.history.History] = None, history_id=None, system_prompt_suffix: Optional[str] = None, adk: Optional[bool] = False, duo_enabled: Optional[bool] = False, run_on_langchain: Optional[bool] = False, use_uni_api: Optional[bool] = False) 
 719    def __init__(self, config: HeavenAgentConfig, unified_chat: UnifiedChat, max_tool_calls: int = 10, orchestrator: bool = False, history: Optional[History] = None, history_id = None, system_prompt_suffix: Optional[str] = None, adk: Optional[bool] = False, duo_enabled: Optional[bool] = False, run_on_langchain: Optional[bool] = False, use_uni_api: Optional[bool] = False):
 720        # Configure root logger to output to stdout
 721        logging.basicConfig(
 722            stream=sys.stdout,
 723            level=logging.DEBUG,  # Adjust the level as needed
 724            format='%(asctime)s %(levelname)s %(name)s: %(message)s'
 725            )
 726        logging.getLogger('watchdog').setLevel(logging.WARNING)
 727        
 728        if config is None:
 729            raise ValueError("config cannot be None")
 730        if unified_chat is None:
 731            raise ValueError("unified_chat cannot be None")
 732        self.use_uni_api = use_uni_api
 733        self.unified_chat = unified_chat
 734        self.known_config_paths = getattr(config, "known_config_paths", None)
 735        if self.known_config_paths is None:
 736            self.known_config_paths = []
 737        self.training_convo = [
 738            SystemMessage(content=""),
 739            HumanMessage(content="Hey I need to teach you how to use the tools correctly before we get started. Once you learn how to use this tool I'm going to show you, you'll know how to handle all of our tools. Essentially, it comes down to acknowledging the errors correctly. For example, can you use NetworkEditTool to write a file in tmp while having no file_content parameter, read the error that is sent back from the tool, and then adjust? file_content is an optional parameter in the NetworkEditTool, but it is actually required for certain operations, like the create command."),
 740            AIMessage(content=[{"text": "Following the instructions to first try without file_text and then fix it, I'll write utility code for an AST analyzer as an example.\n\nFirst attempt (should fail):", "type": "text"}]),
 741            AIMessage(content=[{"type": "tool_use", "id": "toolu_01BPHfZNPMY1tbnsRtRYmG5i", "name": "NetworkEditTool", "input": {"command": "create", "target_container": "creation_of_god", "path": "/tmp/ast_analyzer_utils.py"}}]),
 742            ToolMessage(content="ERROR: Parameter `file_text` is required for command: create", tool_call_id="toolu_01BPHfZNPMY1tbnsRtRYmG5i"),
 743            AIMessage(content=[{"text": "As expected, we need to include file_text. Here's the proper attempt with the utility code:", "type": "text"}]),
 744            AIMessage(content=[{"type": "tool_use", "id": "toolu_01LS6GZDEpEqDVmU8qpvRa65", "name": "NetworkEditTool", "input": {"command": "create", "target_container": "creation_of_god", "path": "/tmp/ast_analyzer_utils.py", "file_text": "\"\"\"AST analyzer utilities for extracting concise code context and dependencies.\"\"\"\n\nimport ast\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Set, Union,
